function onLoad(script_state)
    local state = JSON.decode(script_state)
    makeInteractable(false)
    dataInitialization()
    loadFigurineObjects()
    loadNamePanelObjects()
    refreshHiding()
    for i = 1, 10 do
        if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
            Player[colorList[i]].changeColor('Grey')
        end
    end
    if state ~= nil and state.iCA ~= nil then
        isConfidentialAvailable = state.iCA
    end
    if isConfidentialAvailable == false then
        UI.setAttribute('controlPanel', 'active', 'false')
    else
        UI.setAttribute('controlPanel', 'active', 'true')
    end

    getObjectFromGUID('93d9b6').setHiddenFrom(colorList)

    TableZone[1] = getObjectFromGUID('1f2b6b')
    TableZone[2] = getObjectFromGUID('d41110')
    TableZone[3] = getObjectFromGUID('48d452')
    TableZone[4] = getObjectFromGUID('7e09e2')
    TableZone[5] = getObjectFromGUID('25509a')
    
    for i = 1, 11 do
        existingPlace[colorList[i]] = 1
    end

            table.insert(hidingTable[i], colorList[j])
        end
    end

    roomOccupied[1] = {}
    for i = 2, 5 do
        roomSlotOccupied[i][1] = ''

end

function refreshHiding()
    refreshHidingFunc()
    Wait.frames(refreshHidingFunc, 20)
end

function refreshHidingFunc()
    for z = 1, 5 do
        local objs = TableZone[z].getObjects()
        local hc = inverseColor(roomOccupied[z])
        if z == 1 then removeByValue(hc, 'Grey') end
        
        for i = 1, #objs do
            if string.find(objs[i].getName(), 'CharacterSheet') then
            elseif string.find(objs[i].getDescription(), 'show:') then
            elseif string.find(objs[i].getGMNotes(), 'show:') then
            else
                objs[i].setInvisibleTo(hc)

                if objs[i].getName() == 'NamePanel' then
                    UIVisibilitySettingInverse(objs[i], 'main', hc)
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

function refreshHidingFuncEach(zone, object)
    local hc
    for i = 1, 5 do
        if zone == TableZone[i] then
            hc = inverseColor(roomOccupied[i])
            if i == 1 then removeByValue(hc, 'Grey') end
            break
        end
    end
    if string.find(object.getName(), 'CharacterSheet') then
    elseif string.find(object.getDescription(), 'show:') then
    elseif string.find(object.getGMNotes(), 'show:') then
    else
        object.setInvisibleTo(hc)

        if object.getName() == 'NamePanel' then
            UIVisibilitySettingInverse(object, 'main', hc)
        end
    end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if zone == TableZone[1] or zone == TableZone[2] or zone == TableZone[3] or zone == TableZone[4] or zone == TableZone[5] then
        refreshHidingFuncEach(zone, object)
    end
end

function movePlayer(movingPlayerColor, nextRoom)
    local prevRoom = existingPlace[movingPlayerColor]
    local pzFrom
    local pzTo
    local tzFrom
    local tzTo
    local dvector
    local mobjs
    local tpos
    local nextSlot
    local prevSlot
    
    if findTableIdx(pcColorList, movingPlayerColor) == nil then
        return
    end
    if nextRoom > 1 and findEmptySlotNum(roomSlotOccupied[nextRoom]) == nil then
        safeBroadcastToColor('방이 만석이므로 입장할 수 없습니다.', movingPlayerColor, nil)
        return
    end
    if nextRoom == prevRoom then
        return
    end
    if Player[movingPlayerColor].seated == true then
        Player[movingPlayerColor].lookAt({position=cameraLocation[tonumber(nextRoom)], pitch=55, yaw=0, distance=120})
    end
    if prevRoom == 1 then
        pzFrom = findObject(nil, nil, 'pz-'..movingPlayerColor)
        tzFrom = findObject(nil, nil, 'tz-'..movingPlayerColor)
    else
        prevSlot = findTableIdx(roomSlotOccupied[prevRoom], movingPlayerColor)
        pzFrom = findObject(nil, nil, 'pz'..prevRoom..'-'..prevSlot)
        tzFrom = findObject(nil, nil, 'tz'..prevRoom..'-'..prevSlot)
        roomSlotOccupied[prevRoom][prevSlot] = ''
    end
    removeByValue(roomOccupied[prevRoom], movingPlayerColor)

    if nextRoom == 1 then
        pzTo = findObject(nil, nil, 'pz-'..movingPlayerColor)
        tzTo = findObject(nil, nil, 'tz-'..movingPlayerColor)
    else
        nextSlot = findEmptySlotNum(roomSlotOccupied[nextRoom])
        pzTo = findObject(nil, nil, 'pz'..nextRoom..'-'..nextSlot)
        tzTo = findObject(nil, nil, 'tz'..nextRoom..'-'..nextSlot)
        roomSlotOccupied[nextRoom][nextSlot] = movingPlayerColor
    end
    table.insert(roomOccupied[nextRoom], movingPlayerColor)
    existingPlace[movingPlayerColor] = nextRoom
    dvector = diffVector(pzFrom.getPosition(), pzTo.getPosition())

    mobjs = pcHandZoneOfColor[movingPlayerColor].getObjects()
            
    tpos = pcHandZoneOfColor[movingPlayerColor].getPosition()
    tpos.x = tpos.x + dvector.x
    tpos.y = tpos.y + dvector.y
    tpos.z = tpos.z + dvector.z
    pcHandZoneOfColor[movingPlayerColor].setPosition(tpos)   
    
    local hz = inverseColor(roomOccupied[nextRoom])
    local guidlist = ''
    for _, m in ipairs(mobjs) do
        guidlist = guidlist .. '-' .. m.guid
        tpos = m.getPosition()
        tpos.x = tpos.x + dvector.x
        tpos.y = tpos.y + dvector.y
        tpos.z = tpos.z + dvector.z
        m.setPosition(tpos)
        if string.find(m.getName(), 'CharacterSheet') then
        elseif string.find(m.getDescription(), 'show:') then
        elseif string.find(m.getGMNotes(), 'show:') then
        else
            m.setInvisibleTo(hz)
        end
    end
    mobjs = pzFrom.getObjects()
    for _, m in ipairs(mobjs) do
        if string.find(guidlist, m.guid) == nil then
            tpos = m.getPosition()
            tpos.x = tpos.x + dvector.x
            tpos.y = tpos.y + dvector.y
            tpos.z = tpos.z + dvector.z
            m.setPosition(tpos)
            if string.find(m.getName(), 'CharacterSheet') then
            elseif string.find(m.getDescription(), 'show:') then
            elseif string.find(m.getGMNotes(), 'show:') then
            else
                m.setInvisibleTo(hz)
            end
        end
    end
    mobjs = tzFrom.getObjects()
    for _, m in ipairs(mobjs) do
        if string.find(guidlist, m.guid) == nil then
            tpos = m.getPosition()
            tpos.x = tpos.x + dvector.x
            tpos.y = tpos.y + dvector.y
            tpos.z = tpos.z + dvector.z
            m.setPosition(tpos)
            if string.find(m.getName(), 'CharacterSheet') then
            elseif string.find(m.getDescription(), 'show:') then
            elseif string.find(m.getGMNotes(), 'show:') then
            else
                m.setInvisibleTo(hz)
            end
        end
    end
    if nextRoom == 1 then
        pcFigurineOfColor[movingPlayerColor].setPosition(figurinePosition[1][movingPlayerColor])
        pcNamePanelOfColor[movingPlayerColor].setPosition({figurinePosition[1][movingPlayerColor].x, figurinePosition[1][movingPlayerColor].y, figurinePosition[1][movingPlayerColor].z - 5})
    else
        pcFigurineOfColor[movingPlayerColor].setPosition(figurinePosition[nextRoom][nextSlot])
        pcNamePanelOfColor[movingPlayerColor].setPosition({figurinePosition[nextRoom][nextSlot][1], figurinePosition[nextRoom][nextSlot][2], figurinePosition[nextRoom][nextSlot][3] - 5})
    end
    pcFigurineOfColor[movingPlayerColor].setInvisibleTo(hz)
    pcNamePanelOfColor[movingPlayerColor].setInvisibleTo(hz)
    UIVisibilitySetting(pcNamePanelOfColor[movingPlayerColor], 'main', roomOccupied[nextRoom])


    UI.setAttribute('PC'..pcColorToNum[movingPlayerColor]..'in'..tostring(prevRoom), 'active', 'false')
    UI.setAttribute('PC'..pcColorToNum[movingPlayerColor]..'in'..tostring(nextRoom), 'active', 'true')

    tzTo.setDescription(movingPlayerColor)
    tzTo.call('onLoad')
    panelUpdate()
    refreshHiding()
end

function moveBtClick(player, value, id)
    local roomtomove = string.gsub(id, 'moveBtTo', '')
    if player.color == 'Black' then
        Player['Black'].lookAt({position=cameraLocation[tonumber(roomtomove)], pitch=55, yaw=0, distance=120})
    else
        movePlayer(player.color, tonumber(roomtomove))
    end
end

function safeBroadcastToColor(message, color, textcolor)
    if textcolor == nil then textcolor = 'White' end
    if Player[color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor(message, color, textcolor)
    else
        printToAll('to '..color..': '..message, textcolor)
    end
end

function findObject(name, description, gmnote)
    local objs = getObjects()
    if name == nil and description == nil and gmnote == nil then
        return nil
    end
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if (objs[i].getName() == name or name == nil) and (objs[i].getDescription() == description or description == nil) and (objs[i].getGMNotes() == gmnote or gmnote == nil) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
end

function loadFigurineObjects()
    local figurineGUIDList = {'2fb724', 'ab6d67', '17391f', 'fd71ca', 'cf8048', '55af25', 'b5cdbd', '8d75cd'}
    for i = 1, #figurineGUIDList do
        if getObjectFromGUID(figurineGUIDList[i]) ~= nil then
            figurine[#figurine + 1] = getObjectFromGUID(figurineGUIDList[i])
        end
    end
end

function loadNamePanelObjects()
    
    for i = 1, #NamePanelGUIDList do
        if getObjectFromGUID(NamePanelGUIDList[i]) ~= nil then
            namePanel[#namePanel + 1] = getObjectFromGUID(NamePanelGUIDList[i])
        end
    end
end

function externChooseColor(params)
    local figurineSet = 0
    pcHandZoneOfColor[params.t_color] = makeHandZone(params.t_color, params.t_position)
    params.t_player.changeColor(params.t_color)

    table.insert(roomOccupied[1], params.t_color)
    refreshHiding()

    local colorImageList = {}
    colorImageList['White'] = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/17111647089545987327/CF3E8FA85E08D18B6B9C86C1B128EA5E5D473E00/'
    colorImageList['Brown'] = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/17193308596744856307/41494E9D92DBCA43FCC7BE8CC8F1F3FE2E79F5AF/'
    colorImageList['Red'] = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/12027461971601712644/C2ABDDD6A084A8DB6CC165091E635321D6E72A44/'
    colorImageList['Orange'] = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/14755639495027002418/725954585272BBEBBAF62604A26A6C57A48C727E/'
    colorImageList['Yellow'] = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/14313965131681790289/D788D3DB0846FEE351B2ACB1BB8AD7EF00868969/'
    colorImageList['Green'] = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/10851569107406715369/6ECCAB744BF455AECDB42EF5BD22D200F0E000D0/'
    colorImageList['Teal'] = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/17891824735266989154/604D979B7B01BE2166324028A7711F04554E6A3D/'
    colorImageList['Blue'] = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/12022424284253483987/891434721A39939736D483CBEA2948EC16E29DC2/'
    colorImageList['Purple'] = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/16314049072888653810/4B13ACF7CD8F59258A187319C89EA92506135F3D/'
    colorImageList['Pink'] = 'https://steamusercontent-a.akamaihd.net/ugc/9490205075924717610/BF0CE230A1A6E6A3ED393AF6319EB4DA75576982/'
    
    for i = 1, #figurine do
        if figurine[i] ~= nil then
            local tx = figurine[i].getPosition().x
            pcFigurineOfColor[params.t_color] = nil
            pcNamePanelOfColor[params.t_color] = nil
            if (math.abs(params.t_position.x - tx)) < 1.0 then
                pcFigurineOfColor[params.t_color] = figurine[i]
                pcFigurineOfColor[params.t_color].setColorTint(params.t_color)
                pcNamePanelOfColor[params.t_color] = namePanel[i]
                figurinePosition[1][params.t_color] = pcFigurineOfColor[params.t_color].getPosition()
                break
            end
        end
    end
    
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '캐릭터 선택' then
            local td = objs[i].getDescription()
            if td == params.t_color then
                objs[i].call('externUserFunction', {t_obj = nil, t_color = params.t_color, t_alt_click = false})
                figurineSet = 1
                break
            end
        end
    end

    if figurineSet == 0 then
        externChangeFigurineImg({t_color = params.t_color, t_imgUrl = colorImageList[params.t_color]})
    end

    UI.setAttribute('btChat'..params.t_color, 'active', 'true')
    UI.setAttribute('readyColor'..params.t_color, 'active', 'true')
end

function externChangeFigurineImg(params)
    if pcFigurineOfColor[params.t_color] == nil then
        print('Figure of '..params.t_color..' is nil')
        return nil
    end
    local cobj = pcFigurineOfColor[params.t_color].getCustomObject()
    cobj.image = params.t_imgUrl
    pcFigurineOfColor[params.t_color].setCustomObject(cobj)
    pcFigurineOfColor[params.t_color] = pcFigurineOfColor[params.t_color].reload()
    return pcFigurineOfColor[params.t_color]
end

function debugPlayerList()
    for i = 1, numPC do
        print(pcNameList[i] .. ' ' .. pcColorList[i] .. ' ' .. pcNameOfColor[pcColorList[i]] .. ' ' .. pcColorOfName[pcNameList[i]])
    end
end

function makeHandZone(color, position)
    if color ~= 'White' and color ~= 'Brown' and color ~= 'Red' and color ~= 'Orange' and color ~= 'Yellow' and
    color ~= 'Green' and color ~= 'Teal' and color ~= 'Blue' and color ~= 'Purple' and color ~= 'Pink' then
        return nil
    end

    local hzdataJSON = [[{
      "Name": "HandTrigger",
      "Transform": {
        "posX": 0.0,
        "posY": 5.0,

function isPlayerColor(input)
    if input ~= 'White' and input ~= 'Brown' and input ~= 'Red' and input ~= 'Orange' and input ~= 'Yellow'
        and input ~= 'Green' and input ~= 'Blue' and input ~= 'Purple' and input ~= 'Pink' and input ~= 'Teal' then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function externGetTable(i_tableName)
    if i_tableName == 'pcNameList' then
        return pcNameList
    elseif i_tableName == 'pcColorList' then
        return pcColorList
    elseif i_tableName == 'pcColorOfName' then
        return pcColorOfName
    elseif i_tableName == 'pcNameOfColor' then
        return pcNameOfColor
    elseif i_tableName == 'pcHandZoneOfColor' then
        return pcHandZoneOfColor
    else
        return nil
    end
end

function externPlayerRegister(params)
    pcColorOfName[params.t_name] = params.t_color
    pcNameOfColor[params.t_color] = params.t_name
    numPC = numPC + 1
    pcNameList[numPC] = params.t_name
    pcColorList[numPC] = params.t_color
    pcKorNameOfColor[params.t_color] = nil
    pcColorToNum[params.t_color] = numPC

    -- UI 세팅 관련
    for i = 1, 5 do
        UI.setAttribute('PC'..numPC..'in'..tostring(i), 'visibility', params.t_color)
    end
    UI.setAttribute('PC'..numPC..'in'..1, 'active', 'true')
    local pobj = findObject('Portrait', params.t_name, nil)
    if pobj ~= nil then
        pobj = pobj.getCustomObject()
        pcPortrait[params.t_color] = pobj.image
        UI.setAttribute('ImgSpk'..params.t_color, 'image', pobj.image)
    end
    
    panelUpdate()
    
    -- 단서 카드 금지 관련
    forbidOnesOwnCard(params.t_name, params.t_color)


    -- 포지션 관련
    Wait.frames(function()
        if pcHandZoneOfColor[params.t_color] ~= nil then
            local tpos = pcHandZoneOfColor[params.t_color].getPosition()
            local tile = params.t_infoTile
            local pdf = findObject('CharacterSheet1', nil, pcNameOfColor[params.t_color])

            pcKorNameOfColor[params.t_color] = tile.getDescription()
            if pcKorNameOfColor[params.t_color] == nil then pcKorNameOfColor[params.t_color] = '' end

            tile.setLock(true)
            tile.setPositionSmooth({tpos.x, tpos.y - 2.2, tpos.z + 3 + (tile.getBounds().size.z / 2)}, false, true)
            
            if pdf ~= nil then
                local scaleratio = tile.getBounds().size.z / pdf.getBounds().size.z
                pdf.setScale({pdf.getScale().x * scaleratio, pdf.getScale().y * scaleratio, pdf.getScale().z * scaleratio})
                pdf.setInvisibleTo(inverseColor({params.t_color}))
                pdf.setDescription('show:'..params.t_color)
                pdf.setPosition({tpos.x, tpos.y - 1.7, tpos.z + 3 + (tile.getBounds().size.z / 2)})
                pdf.setLock(true)
                for i = 2, 10 do
                    local npdf = findObject('CharacterSheet'..tostring(i), nil, pcNameOfColor[params.t_color])
                    if npdf ~= nil then
                        npdf.setDescription('show:'..params.t_color)
                    else
                        break
                    end
                end
            end

            cBag_vp[params.t_color][1] = 1
            cBag_vp[params.t_color][2] = {x = tpos.x, y = tpos.y - 1.88, z = tpos.z + 20.6}
            if cBag ~= nil then
                cBag.setTable('value_pList', cBag_vp)
            end

            local minpz = 999
            local mintz = 999
            local tabsp
            local tabst
            local objs = getObjects()
            local minpzobj
            local mintzobj
            for i = 1, #objs do
                if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'pz1' then
                    tabsp = math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - pcHandZoneOfColor[params.t_color].getPosition().x)
                    if tabsp < minpz then
                        minpz = tabsp
                        pcPdfZoneOfColor[params.t_color] = objs[i]
                        minpzobj = objs[i]
                    end
                elseif objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'tz1' then
                    tabst = math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - pcHandZoneOfColor[params.t_color].getPosition().x)
                    if tabst < mintz then
                        mintz = tabst
                        pcSpareZoneOfColor[params.t_color] = objs[i]
                        mintzobj = objs[i]
                    end
                end
            end
            if minpzobj ~= nil then
                minpzobj.setGMNotes('pz-'..params.t_color)
            end
            if mintzobj ~= nil then
                mintzobj.setGMNotes('tz-'..params.t_color)
                mintzobj.setDescription(params.t_color)
                mintzobj.call('onLoad')
            end

            if pcNamePanelOfColor[params.t_color] ~= nil then
                pcNamePanelOfColor[params.t_color].call('setText', pcKorNameOfColor[params.t_color])
            end

            -- 초기 지급품
            local initialCards = getObjectFromGUID('c9102f').getObjects()
            for i = 1, #initialCards do
                if initialCards[i].getGMNotes() == 'initial'..params.t_name then
                    initialCards[i].use_hands = true
                    initialCards[i].setHiddenFrom({})
                    initialCards[i].deal(1, params.t_color, 1)
                end
            end
            
        end
    end, 20)
end

function forbidOnesOwnCard(p_name, color)
    if cBag ~= nil then
        local objs = getObjects()
        if p_name ~= '' and p_name ~= nil then
            local keyword = 'pcName='..p_name
            for i = 1, #objs do
                if string.find(objs[i].getGMNotes(), 'CHESTER_CARD') then
                    local cardMemo = objs[i].call('getEtcMemo')
                    if string.find(cardMemo, keyword) then
                        objs[i].call('setColorRestriction', color)
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end
end

end

function removeByValue(t, val)
    for i, v in ipairs(t) do
        if v == val then
            table.remove(t, i)
            break
        end
    end
end

function findEmptySlotNum(tbl)
    for i = 1, 4 do
        if tbl[i] == '' then
            return i
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function findTableIdx(tbl, value)
    for i = 1, #tbl do
        if tbl[i] == value then
            return i
        end
    end
    return nil
end

function diffVector(posA, posB)
    if posA == nil or posB == nil then
        return nil
    end
    local valueA = {x = nil, y = nil, z = nil}
    local valueB = {x = nil, y = nil, z = nil}
    if (posA.x == nil and posA[1] == nil) or (posA.y == nil and posA[2] == nil) or (posA.z == nil and posA[3] == nil) then
        return nil
    elseif (posB.x == nil and posB[1] == nil) or (posB.y == nil and posB[2] == nil) or (posB.z == nil and posB[3] == nil) then
        return nil
    end
    if posA.x ~= nil then
        valueA.x = posA.x
        valueA.y = posA.y
        valueA.z = posA.z
    else
        valueA.x = posA[1]
        valueA.y = posA[2]
        valueA.z = posA[3]
    end
    if posB.x ~= nil then
        valueB.x = posB.x
        valueB.y = posB.y
        valueB.z = posB.z
    else
        valueB.x = posB[1]
        valueB.y = posB[2]
        valueB.z = posB[3]
    end
    valueB.x = valueB.x - valueA.x
    valueB.y = valueB.y - valueA.y
    valueB.z = valueB.z - valueA.z
    return valueB
end

end

function inverseColor(colorTable)
    local retColors = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
    for i = 1, #colorTable do
        removeByValue(retColors, colorTable[i])
    end
    return retColors
end

            if pcPortrait[roomOccupied[1][j]] ~= nil then

            end
            UI.setAttribute('Room1PC'..tostring(j), 'active', 'true')

            UI.setAttribute('Room1PC'..tostring(j), 'active', 'false')
        end
    end
    for i = 2, 5 do

                if pcPortrait[roomOccupied[i][j]] ~= nil then
                    UI.setAttribute('Room'..tostring(i)..'PC'..tostring(j), 'image', pcPortrait[roomOccupied[i][j]])
                end

        end
    end

-- 채팅 쪽 모듈
function addChat()
    if chatDisplaying == 0 then
        chatDisplaying = 1
        showNextChat()
    end
end

function chatingSwitch(boolInput)
    if boolInput == false then
        chatDisplaySwitch = 0
    else
        chatDisplaySwitch = 1
    end
end

function showNextChat()
    local tmpWaitTime
    local mintime
    local addtime
    local maxtime

    mintime = 5.5 / (3 + nChatMsg)
    addtime = 1.0 / (4 + nChatMsg)
    maxtime = 24 / (4 + nChatMsg)

    if nChatMsg == 0 then
        chatDisplaying = 0
        for i = 1, #pcColorList do
            displayShowPC[pcColorList[i]] = 0
        end
        displayShowPC['Black'] = 0
        displayShowPC['Grey'] = 0
        displayShow()
        return
    else
        displayChat(chatSpk[1], chatMsg[1])
        tmpWaitTime = mintime + (#chatMsg[1] * addtime)
        if tmpWaitTime > maxtime then
            tmpWaitTime = maxtime
        end
        for i = 1, (nChatMsg - 1) do
            chatMsg[i] = chatMsg[i + 1]
            chatSpk[i] = chatSpk[i + 1]
        end
        nChatMsg = nChatMsg - 1
        Wait.time(showNextChat, tmpWaitTime)
    end
end

function displayChat(spk, msg)
    local tmpMsg = msg
    local speakingColor
    local outlineColor
    -- !!!!!!!!! 이곳도 수정 필요!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
    for i = 1, #pcColorList do
        UI.setAttribute('ImgSpk'..pcColorList[i], 'active', 'false')
        if spk == pcKorNameOfColor[pcColorList[i]] and pcPortrait[pcColorList[i]] ~= nil then
            UI.setAttribute('ImgSpk'..pcColorList[i], 'active', 'true')
            speakingColor = hexColor[pcColorList[i]]
        end
        displayShowPC[pcColorList[i]] = 1
    end
    displayShowPC['Black'] = 1
    displayShowPC['Grey'] = 1

    UI.setValue('TextSpk', spk)
    UI.setAttribute('TextSpk', 'color', speakingColor)
    UI.setValue('TextMsg', tmpMsg)
    displayShow()
end

function displayShow()
    local tmpTarget
    local tmpSum = 0

    tmpTarget = 'nil'
    tmpSum = 0
    for i = 1, #pcColorList do
        tmpSum = tmpSum + displayShowPC[pcColorList[i]]
    end
    if tmpSum == 0 then
        UI.setAttribute('ChatWindow', 'visibility', 'nil')
        return
    end
    for i = 1, #pcColorList do
        if displayShowPC[pcColorList[i]] == 1 then
            tmpTarget = tmpTarget..'|'..pcColorList[i]
        end
    end
    if displayShowPC['Black'] == 1 then
        tmpTarget = tmpTarget..'|Black'
    end
    if displayShowPC['Grey'] == 1 then
        tmpTarget = tmpTarget..'|Grey'
    end
    UI.setAttribute('ChatWindow', 'visibility', tmpTarget)
end
-- 채팅 쪽 모듈 끝. onChat은 따로 수정 필요함.

function onChat(message, sender)
    if sender.color == 'Black' or sender.host == true then
        if message == '!삭제' then
            local tmpObj = getObjects()
            for i = 1, #tmpObj do
                if string.find(tmpObj[i].getName(), 'CharacterSheet') or string.find(tmpObj[i].getName(), 'RuleBook') or string.find(tmpObj[i].getName(), 'EndingBook') or tmpObj[i].getName() == 'GM참고용' then
                    tmpObj[i].destroyObject()
                end
            end

        elseif sender.color == 'Black' then -- 이 조건문이 가장 마지막으로 갈 것.
            nChatMsg = nChatMsg + 1
            chatMsg[nChatMsg] = string.sub(message, 1)
            printToAll("GM : "..string.sub(message, 1), {0, 1, 0})
            chatSpk[nChatMsg] = "<textcolor color='#00FF00'>GM</textcolor>"
            addChat()
            return false
        end
    end

    if sender.color == 'Brown' or sender.color == 'Pink' or sender.color == 'Blue' or sender.color == 'Purple' or sender.color == 'White' or sender.color == 'Orange' or
    sender.color == 'Yellow' or sender.color == 'Green' or sender.color == 'Teal' or sender.color == 'Red' then
        if chatDisplaySwitch == 1 then
            nChatMsg = nChatMsg + 1
            chatMsg[nChatMsg] = message
            chatSpk[nChatMsg] = pcKorNameOfColor[sender.color]
            addChat()
        end
        return true
    end
    return true
end


GMSendingColor = ''
function chattingEnter(player, value, id)
    local msgStr
    if player.color == 'Black' and GMSendingColor == '' then
        return
    end
    if value:sub(#value, #value) == '\n' then
        msgStr = value:sub(1, -2)
        if msgStr ~= '' then
            addChattingMessage(msgStr, player.color)
        end
        UI.setValue(id, '')
        UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', '')
    end
end

offsetValue = {}
offsetValue['White'] = 0
offsetValue['Brown'] = 0
offsetValue['Red'] = 0
offsetValue['Orange'] = 0
offsetValue['Yellow'] = 0
offsetValue['Green'] = 0
offsetValue['Teal'] = 0
offsetValue['Blue'] = 0
offsetValue['Purple'] = 0
offsetValue['Pink'] = 0
offsetValue['Black'] = 0
allChattingLog = {}
allChattingLog['White'] = ''
allChattingLog['Brown'] = ''
allChattingLog['Red'] = ''
allChattingLog['Orange'] = ''
allChattingLog['Yellow'] = ''
allChattingLog['Green'] = ''
allChattingLog['Teal'] = ''
allChattingLog['Blue'] = ''
allChattingLog['Purple'] = ''
allChattingLog['Pink'] = ''
function addChattingMessage(msgStr, color)
    local cColor
    if color == 'Black' then
        if GMSendingColor == '' then
            return
        else 
            cColor = GMSendingColor
        end
    else
        cColor = color
    end
    local result = {}
    for i = 1, #msgStr do
        if string.byte(msgStr, i) == 38 then
            result[#result + 1] = '＆'
        elseif string.byte(msgStr, i) == 60 then
            result[#result + 1] = '＜'
        elseif string.byte(msgStr, i) == 62 then
            result[#result + 1] = '＞'
        else
            result[#result + 1] = string.sub(msgStr, i, i)
        end
    end
    msgStr = table.concat(result)
    if color == 'Black' then
        allChattingLog[cColor] = allChattingLog[cColor] .. '\n<textcolor color="#0077ffff"><b>' .. pcKorNameOfColor['Black'] .. ':</b></textcolor> <textcolor color="#0000e6ff">' .. msgStr .. '</textcolor>'
    else
        allChattingLog[cColor] = allChattingLog[cColor] .. '\n<textcolor color="#880000ff"><b>' .. pcKorNameOfColor[cColor] .. ':</b></textcolor> ' .. msgStr
    end
    UI.setValue('chattingLog'..cColor, allChattingLog[cColor])
    UI.setAttribute('chattingLog'..cColor, 'offsetXY', '5 2')
    UI.setValue('GMchattingLog'..cColor, allChattingLog[cColor])
    UI.setAttribute('GMchattingLog'..cColor, 'offsetXY', '5 2')
    offsetValue[cColor] = 0
    if color ~= 'Black' then
        UI.setAttribute('current'..cColor, 'color', '#FF0000')
        UI.setAttribute('newicon', 'active', 'true')
    end
    if color == 'Black' and cColor == GMSendingColor then
        UI.setAttribute('current'..cColor, 'color', '#00FF00')
        Wait.time(function()
        local newsw = 0
        for i = 1, 10 do
            if UI.getAttribute('current'..colorList[i], 'color') == '#FF0000' then
                newsw = 1
                break
            end
        end
        if newsw == 0 then
            UI.setAttribute('newicon', 'active', 'false')
        end
    end, 0.2)
    end
end

function btScroll(player, value, id)
    local cColor
    if player.color == 'Black' then
        if GMSendingColor == '' then
            return
        else 
            cColor = GMSendingColor
        end
    else
        cColor = player.color
    end
    if player.color == 'Black' then
        if GMSendingColor ~= '' then
            if id == 'scrollUp' then
                offsetValue['Black'] = offsetValue['Black'] - 120
            else
                offsetValue['Black'] = offsetValue['Black'] + 120
                if offsetValue['Black'] > 0 then offsetValue['Black'] = 2 end
            end
            UI.setAttribute('GMchattingLog'..GMSendingColor, 'offsetXY', '5 '..tostring(offsetValue['Black']))
        end
    else
        if id == 'scrollUp' then
            offsetValue[cColor] = offsetValue[cColor] - 120
        else
            offsetValue[cColor] = offsetValue[cColor] + 120
            if offsetValue[cColor] > 0 then offsetValue[cColor] = 2 end
        end
        UI.setAttribute('chattingLog'..cColor, 'offsetXY', '5 '..tostring(offsetValue[cColor]))
    end
end

effectValue = 1
effectSwitch = 0
function startStopReady(player, value, id)
    if id == 'startReady' then
        if player.color ~= 'Black' and player.host == false then
            broadcastToColor('GM이나 호스트 플레이어만 가능합니다.', player.color)
            return
        end
        broadcastToAll('모든 플레이어들은 준비가 완료되면 "준비 중" 버튼을 눌러주세요.', {0, 1, 0})
        UI.setAttribute('startReady', 'active', 'false')
        UI.setAttribute('readyColorPanel', 'active', 'true')
        UI.setAttribute('readyPlayerButton', 'active', 'true')
        for i = 1, 10 do
            UI.setAttribute('readyState'..colorList[i], 'color', '#000000')
            readyColor[colorList[i]] = 0
        end
        effectSwitch = 1
        repeatReadyButtonEffect()
    else
        effectSwitch = 0
        if id ~= '' then
            broadcastToAll('준비 확인이 끝났습니다.', {0, 1, 0})
        end
        UI.setAttribute('startReady', 'active', 'true')
        UI.setAttribute('readyColorPanel', 'active', 'false')
        UI.setAttribute('readyPlayerButton', 'active', 'false')
        for i = 1, 10 do
            UI.setAttribute('readyState'..colorList[i], 'color', '#000000')
            readyColor[colorList[i]] = 0
            UI.setAttribute('readyCancelButton'..colorList[i], 'active', 'false')
            UI.setAttribute('readyButton'..colorList[i], 'active', 'true')
        end
    end
end

timerid = nil 
function repeatReadyButtonEffect()
    timerid = Wait.time(function()
        if effectSwitch == 1 then
            if effectValue == 1 then
                effectValue = 2
                UI.setAttribute('readyButtonEffect', 'active', 'true')
            elseif effectValue == 2 then
                effectValue = 1
                UI.setAttribute('readyButtonEffect', 'active', 'false')
            end
        else
            UI.setAttribute('readyButtonEffect', 'active', 'false')
            Wait.stop(timerid)
        end
    end, 0.75, -1)
end

function readyButton(player, value, id)
    if id == 'readyCancelButton'..player.color then
        UI.setAttribute(id, 'active', 'false')
        UI.setAttribute('readyButton'..player.color, 'active', 'true')
        UI.setAttribute('readyState'..player.color, 'color', '#000000')
        readyColor[player.color] = 0
    elseif id == 'readyButton'..player.color then
        UI.setAttribute(id, 'active', 'false')
        UI.setAttribute('readyCancelButton'..player.color, 'active', 'true')
        UI.setAttribute('readyState'..player.color, 'color', '#00FF00')
        readyColor[player.color] = 1
        local completeSw = 1
        for i = 1, numPC do
            if readyColor[pcColorList[i]] == 0 then
                completeSw = 0
                break
            end
        end
        if completeSw == 1 then
            local soundbox = getObjectFromGUID('f3e075')
            soundbox.AssetBundle.playTriggerEffect(11)
            broadcastToAll('모든 플레이어가 준비완료되었습니다.', {0, 1, 0})
            startStopReady(player, value, '')
        end
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: ScriptingTrigger
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function setHiddenByZone(object)
    local objZones = object.getZones()
    local hideFrom = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
    local zoneDesc
    local zoneCount = 0
    if string.find(object.getDescription(), 'nohide') or string.find(object.getName(), 'nohide') or string.find(object.getGMNotes(), 'nohide') then
        return
    end
    for i = 1, #objZones do
        zoneDesc = objZones[i].getDescription()
        if objZones[i].getName() == 'coverzone' then
            zoneCount = zoneCount + 1
            for j = 1, #hideFrom do
                if string.find(zoneDesc, hideFrom[j]) then
                    hideFrom[j] = 'Grey'
                end
            end
        end
    end
    if zoneCount == 0 then
        object.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        object.setHiddenFrom(hideFrom)
    end
end
function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if zone == self then
        setHiddenByZone(object)
    end
end
function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if zone == self then
        setHiddenByZone(object)
    end
end
function onLoad()
    local tmpobjs = self.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #tmpobjs do
        setHiddenByZone(tmpobjs[i])
    end
end

function onLoad()
    self.interactable = false
    self.gizmo_selectable = false
end

ObjectStates.Name: ScriptingTrigger
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
-- script zone의 이름(name)을 hidezone 으로 설정할 것
-- 설명(description)에, 투명효과에 제외한 색상을 적을 것 
-- 색상 이름 첫글자는 대문자 필수. 여러개 색상 적어도 됨.
-- Grey는 적용 안됨
function setInvisibleByZone(object)
    local objZones = object.getZones()
    local hideFrom = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
    local zoneDesc
    local zoneCount = 0
    if string.find(object.getDescription(), 'nohide') or string.find(object.getName(), 'nohide') or string.find(object.getGMNotes(), 'nohide') then
        return
    end
    for i = 1, #objZones do
        zoneDesc = objZones[i].getDescription()
        if objZones[i].getName() == 'hidezone' then
            zoneCount = zoneCount + 1
            for j = 1, #hideFrom do
                if string.find(zoneDesc, hideFrom[j]) then
                    hideFrom[j] = 'Grey'
                end
            end
        end
    end
    if zoneCount == 0 then
        object.setInvisibleTo({})
    else
        object.setInvisibleTo(hideFrom)
    end
end
function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if zone == self then
        setInvisibleByZone(object)
    end
end
function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if zone == self then
        if string.find(object.getDescription(), 'show:') then
            local tcolor = object.getDescription()
            tcolor = string.gsub(tcolor, 'show:', '')
            object.setInvisibleTo(inverseColor({tcolor}))
        else
            setInvisibleByZone(object)
        end
    end
end
function onLoad()
    local tmpobjs = self.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #tmpobjs do
        setInvisibleByZone(tmpobjs[i])
    end
end
function removeByValue(t, val)
    for i, v in ipairs(t) do
        if v == val then
            table.remove(t, i)
            break
        end
    end
end
function inverseColor(colorTable)
    local retColors = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
    for i = 1, #colorTable do
        removeByValue(retColors, colorTable[i])
    end
    return retColors
end

ObjectStates.Name: BlockSquare
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
autoHideSwitch = 0

btparams1 = {
    click_function = "hideObjects",
    function_owner = self,
    label          = "숨기기",
    position       = {0, 1, -0.25},
    rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
    width          = 1100,
    height         = 330,
    font_size      = 180,
    scale          = {0.3, 0.3, 0.3},
    color          = {1, 1, 1},
    font_color     = {0, 0, 0},
    tooltip        = "오브젝트를 숨깁니다.",
}
btparams2 = {
    click_function = "showObjects",
    function_owner = self,
    label          = "보이기",
    position       = {0, 1, 0},
    rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
    width          = 1100,
    height         = 330,
    font_size      = 180,
    scale          = {0.3, 0.3, 0.3},
    color          = {1, 1, 1},
    font_color     = {0, 0, 0},
    tooltip        = "오브젝트를 보이게 합니다.",
}
btparams3 = {
    click_function = "autoHideObjects",
    function_owner = self,
    label          = "자동 숨김",
    position       = {0, 1, 0.25},
    rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
    width          = 1100,
    height         = 330,
    font_size      = 180,
    scale          = {0.3, 0.3, 0.3},
    color          = {1, 1, 1},
    font_color     = {0, 0, 0},
    tooltip        = "계속 오브젝트를 숨깁니다.\n(새로운 오브젝트가 생기거나 GMNotes가 변경될 때에도 숨겨짐)",
}

function onLoad(script_state)
    local savedTable = JSON.decode(script_state)

    if savedTable ~= nil then
        if savedTable.AHS ~= nil then
            autoHideSwitch = savedTable.AHS
        end
    end
    if autoHideSwitch == 0 then
        hideObjects(self, 'Black', false)
    end
    self.createButton(btparams1)
    self.createButton(btparams2)
    self.createButton(btparams3)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        AHS = autoHideSwitch
    }
    return JSON.encode(state)
end

function hideObjects(obj, color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then
        return
    end
    if color ~= 'Black' and color ~= nil then
        if Player[color].host == false and Player[color].promoted == false and Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('검정색 플레이어 또는 호스트나 프로모트 플레이어만이 조정할 수 있습니다.')
            return
        end
    end
    
    if autoHideSwitch == 1 then
        if Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 꺼집니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
        end
        autoHideSwitch = 0
    end
    self.setColorTint({0, 0, 1})
    if Player[color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('개인 오브젝트를 숨깁니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
    end
    hideObjects_func()
end

function showObjects(obj, color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then
        return
    end
    if color ~= 'Black' and color ~= nil then
        if Player[color].host == false and Player[color].promoted == false and Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('검정색 플레이어 또는 호스트나 프로모트 플레이어만이 조정할 수 있습니다.')
            return
        end
    end

    local gmzone_guid = '0e399c'
    local tmpObjects = getObjects()
    local desc
    if autoHideSwitch == 1 then
        if Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 꺼집니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
        end
        autoHideSwitch = 0
    end
    self.setColorTint({0, 0, 0})
    if Player[color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('개인 오브젝트 숨김을 해제합니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
    end
    for i = 1, #tmpObjects do
        desc = string.lower(tmpObjects[i].getDescription())
        if string.find(desc, 'show:') then
            local oZones = tmpObjects[i].getZones()
            local brksw = 0
            for j = 1, #oZones do
                if oZones[j].guid == gmzone_guid then
                    brksw = 1
                    break
                end
            end
            if brksw == 0 then
                tmpObjects[i].setInvisibleTo({})
            end
        end
    end
end

function autoHideObjects(obj, color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then
        return
    end
    if color ~= 'Black' and color ~= nil then
        if Player[color].host == false and Player[color].promoted == false and Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('검정색 플레이어 또는 호스트나 프로모트 플레이어만이 조정할 수 있습니다.')
            return
        end
    end

    if autoHideSwitch == 0 then
        if Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 켜집니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
        end
        autoHideSwitch = 1
        self.setColorTint({0, 0.5, 0})
    else
        if Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 꺼집니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
        end
        autoHideSwitch = 0
        self.setColorTint({0, 0, 1})
    end
end


function hideObjects_func()
    local gmzone_guid = '0e399c'
    local tmpObjects = getObjects()
    local desc
    for i = 1, #tmpObjects do
        desc = string.lower(tmpObjects[i].getDescription())
        local allColors = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
        local hideColors = {}
        if string.find(desc, 'show:') then
            local oZones = tmpObjects[i].getZones()
            local brksw = 0
            for j = 1, #oZones do
                if oZones[j].guid == gmzone_guid then
                    brksw = 1
                    break
                end
            end
            if brksw == 0 then
                for j = 1, #allColors do
                    if string.find(desc, string.lower(allColors[j])) == nil then
                        hideColors[#hideColors + 1] = allColors[j]
                    end
                end
                tmpObjects[i].setInvisibleTo(hideColors)
            end
        end
    end
end


function onFixedUpdate()
    if autoHideSwitch == 1 then
        hideObjects_func()
    end
end

function getSelectingOrder(obj, color, alt)
    if alt == true then
        return
    end

    local greymen = {}
    local nickname = {}
    local nName = 0
    local nicknameOrdered = {}
    local nOrdered = 1
    local rv = 0
    local listToBroadcast = ""
    
    greymen = Player.getSpectators()
    nName = #greymen
    for i = 1, #greymen do
        nickname[i] = greymen[i].steam_name
    end
    
    for i = 1, #greymen do
        rv = math.random(1, nName)
        nicknameOrdered[nOrdered] = '['..nickname[rv]..']'
        nOrdered = nOrdered + 1
        nickname[rv] = nickname[nName]
        nName = nName - 1
    end
    for i = 1, #greymen do
        listToBroadcast = listToBroadcast..nicknameOrdered[i].."\n"
    end
    broadcastToAll('회색 플레이어('..tostring(#greymen).."명) 중 순서를 정합니다. - 채팅창 확인!")
    printToAll(listToBroadcast.."----------------------------------")
end

colorValue['Brown'] = {0.443, 0.231, 0.09}
colorValue['Red'] = {0.856, 0.1, 0.094}
colorValue['Orange'] = {0.956, 0.392, 0.113}
colorValue['Yellow'] = {0.905, 0.898, 0.172}
colorValue['Green'] = {0.192, 0.701, 0.168}
colorValue['Teal'] = {0.129, 0.694, 0.607}
colorValue['Blue'] = {0.118, 0.53, 1}
colorValue['Purple'] = {0.627, 0.125, 0.941}
colorValue['Pink'] = {0.96, 0.439, 0.807}

function getColorOrder(obj, color, alt)
    if alt == true then
        return
    end

    local colorList = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink'}
    local seatedColor = {}
    local nColor = 0
    local rv = 0
    local pName

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
            nColor = nColor + 1
            seatedColor[nColor] = colorList[i]
        end
    end

    broadcastToAll("색상 플레이어("..tostring(nColor).."명) 중 순서를 정합니다. - 채팅창 확인!")
    
    while nColor > 0 do
        rv = math.random(1, nColor)
        if Player[seatedColor[rv]].steam_name ~= nil and Player[seatedColor[rv]].steam_name ~= '' then
            pName = Player[seatedColor[rv]].steam_name
        else
            pName = seatedColor[rv]
        end
        
        printToAll('['..pName..']', colorValue[seatedColor[rv]])
        seatedColor[rv] = seatedColor[nColor]
        nColor = nColor - 1
    end
    printToAll("----------------------------------")
end

function onLoad()
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=1, z=0}, scale={4, 4, 4}, color={r=1, g=0, b=0}, 
        click_function='userFunction', function_owner=self, tooltip=self.getName()})
end

step = 1
function userFunction(obj, color, alt_click)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == 'CharacterSheet'..tostring(step) then
            local npdf = findObject('CharacterSheet'..tostring(step + 1), nil, objs[i].getGMNotes())
            if npdf ~= nil then
                npdf.setScale(objs[i].getScale())
                npdf.setRotation(objs[i].getRotation())
                npdf.setPosition(objs[i].getPosition())
                npdf.setLock(objs[i].getLock())
                objs[i].destroyObject()
            end
        end
    end
    step = step + 1
end

function findObject(name, description, gmnote)
    local objs = getObjects()
    if name == nil and description == nil and gmnote == nil then
        return nil
    end
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if (objs[i].getName() == name or name == nil) and (objs[i].getDescription() == description or description == nil) and (objs[i].getGMNotes() == gmnote or gmnote == nil) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
end

    if isUIInitialized == 0 then

    if isVoteStarted == 0 then

        broadcastToAll(self.getDescription()..' 투표가 시작되었습니다.')
        for i = 1, #voterColorList do

        for i = 1, #targetNameList do

        end
        Global.UI.setAttribute('guid' .. self.guid .. '_vote_window', 'active', 'true')

function onLoad()

        function_owner = self,

end


function makeVote()
    local nVoters = 0
    local nTargets = 0
    local targetName = {}
    local targetImage = {}
    local voterColor = {}
    local voterName = {}
    local str
    local tmpstr

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if self.UI.getValue('voter_' .. tostring(i)) ~= nil and self.UI.getValue('voter_' .. tostring(i)) ~= '' then
            nVoters = nVoters + 1
            voterColor[nVoters] = colorList[i]
            voterName[nVoters] = self.UI.getValue('voter_' .. tostring(i))
            if string.find(voterName[nVoters], ' ') then
                broadcastToAll('공백은 입력할 수 없습니다. _로 바꿔주세요.')
            end
            for j = 1, nVoters - 1 do
                if voterName[nVoters] == voterName[j] then
                    broadcastToAll('같은 투표자 이름을 두 개 이상 입력할 수 없습니다.')
                    return
                end
            end
        end
        
        if self.UI.getValue('target_' .. tostring(i)) ~= nil and self.UI.getValue('target_' .. tostring(i)) ~= '' then
            nTargets = nTargets + 1
            targetName[nTargets] = self.UI.getValue('target_' .. tostring(i))
            targetImage[nTargets] = self.UI.getValue('targetImage_' .. tostring(i))
            if targetImage[nTargets] == nil then
                targetImage[nTargets] = ''
            end

            if string.find(targetName[nTargets], ' ') then
                broadcastToAll('공백은 입력할 수 없습니다. _로 바꿔주세요.')
            end
            for j = 1, nTargets - 1 do
                if targetName[nTargets] == targetName[j] then
                    broadcastToAll('같은 투표 대상 이름을 두 개 이상 입력할 수 없습니다.')
                    return
                end
            end
        end

    if nVoters <= 1 or nTargets <= 1 then

ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=1, z=0}, scale={4, 4, 4}, color={r=0.0, g=0.0, b=0}, 
        click_function='userFunction', function_owner=self, tooltip=self.getName()})
end


function userFunction(obj, color, alt_click)
    Global.call('toggleConfidentialTalk')
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Assetbundle
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
--Announces when time runs out with a broadcast/chat message. (true or false)
announceToggle = false

--The colors the tool is, if fadeout mode is on (in r,g,b format, 0-1)
fadeoutColor_start = {1, 1, 1}
fadeoutColor_end = {0.1, 0.1, 0.1}

panelID = nil
displayerID = nil
moveButtonID = nil
currentGMNote = nil
currentColorTint = nil
UIoffsetX = '-550'
UIoffsetY = '-45'
UIcolorCode = '000000'
UIDisplaySwitch = true

function addGlobalXML()
    local globalxmlstr = nil
    local retxmlstr = nil
    
    panelID = 'timer_panel_by_chester_' .. self.guid
    displayerID = 'timer_displayer_by_chester_' .. self.guid
    moveButtonID = 'movebts_' .. self.guid

    local additionalxml = [[
    <Panel id=']] .. panelID .. [[' offsetXY=']] .. UIoffsetX .. ' ' .. UIoffsetY .. [[' active='false' width='130' height='58' rectAlignment='UpperCenter' color='#00000000'>
    <Text id=']] .. displayerID .. [[' color='#FFFFFF' fontSize='60' fontStyle='Bold' outline='#]] .. UIcolorCode .. [[' outlineSize='2 2'
    shadow='#000000' shadowDistance='4 -4' horizontalOverflow='Overflow' verticalOverflow='Overflow' showAnimation='Grow' animationDuration='0.2'
    hideAnimationDelay='2' hideAnimation='FadeOut'>0:00</Text>
    <Panel id=']] .. moveButtonID .. [[' active='false'>
    <Button id='bt_up' offsetXY="0 30" width="40" height="40" color="#000000FA" textColor="#FFFFFF" fontSize="14" onClick="]] .. self.guid .. [[/moveTimerUI">▲</Button>
    <Button id='bt_down' offsetXY="0 -30" width="40" height="40" color="#000000FA" textColor="#FFFFFF" fontSize="14" onClick="]] .. self.guid .. [[/moveTimerUI">▼</Button>
    <Button id='bt_right' offsetXY="65 0" width="40" height="40" color="#000000FA" textColor="#FFFFFF" fontSize="14" onClick="]] .. self.guid .. [[/moveTimerUI">▶</Button>
    <Button id='bt_left' offsetXY="-65 0" width="40" height="40" color="#000000FA" textColor="#FFFFFF" fontSize="14" onClick="]] .. self.guid .. [[/moveTimerUI">◀</Button>
    </Panel>
    </Panel>
    ]]

    globalxmlstr = Global.UI.getXml()
    if globalxmlstr == nil then
        retxmlstr = additionalxml
    elseif string.find(globalxmlstr, panelID) == nil then
        retxmlstr = additionalxml..globalxmlstr
    end
    if retxmlstr ~= nil then
        Global.UI.setXml(retxmlstr)
    end
end

--Runs whenever game is saved/autosaved
function onSave()
    local data_to_save = {
        cr=countdownRemaining,
        cg=countdownGoal,
        rof=resetOnFlip,
        pc=pauseCountdown,
        ft=fadeToggle,
        dsw=UIDisplaySwitch
    }
    saved_data = JSON.encode(data_to_save)
    --saved_data = "" --Remove -- at start + save to clear save data
    return saved_data
end

--Runs when game is loaded
function onLoad(saved_data)
    currentGMNote = self.getGMNotes()
    currentColorTint = self.getColorTint()
    -- setting UIoffsetX, UIoffsetY, UIcolorCode
    getUIoffsetXY()
    getColorCode()

    self.addContextMenuItem('화면표시On/Off', displayerToggle, false)
    self.addContextMenuItem('시간텍스트 이동', showMoveButton, false)

    --Loads the tracking for if the game has started yet
    if saved_data ~= "" then
        local loaded_data = JSON.decode(saved_data)
        countdownRemaining = loaded_data.cr
        countdownGoal = loaded_data.cg
        resetOnFlip = loaded_data.rof
        pauseCountdown = loaded_data.pc
        fadeToggle = loaded_data.ft
        UIDisplaySwitch = loaded_data.dsw
    else
        countdownGoal = 10
        countdownRemaining = countdownGoal
        resetOnFlip = true
        pauseCountdown = false
        fadeToggle = true
        UIDisplaySwitch = true
    end

    --Establish color offset, how much needs to be added to fadeoutColor_start
    fadeoutColor_offset = {
        fadeoutColor_start[1]-fadeoutColor_end[1],
        fadeoutColor_start[2]-fadeoutColor_end[2],
        fadeoutColor_start[3]-fadeoutColor_end[3],
    }

    --Tracks if tool was upright based on its current memory
    currentlyUp = true
    if upsideDown() then currentlyUp = false end

    createDisplayButtons()
    createFunctionButtons()
    createTimeInputs()
    
    --Global UI timer display
    Wait.frames(function()
        addGlobalXML()
        Global.UI.setAttribute(displayerID, 'active', 'true')
        Wait.frames(function()
            if UIDisplaySwitch == false then
                Global.UI.setAttribute(panelID, 'active', 'false')
            else
                Global.UI.setAttribute(panelID, 'active', 'true')
            end
        end, 100)
    end, math.floor(tonumber(self.guid, 16) / 50000))
end

function displayerToggle(player_color, position, object)
    if UIDisplaySwitch == false then
        UIDisplaySwitch = true
        Global.UI.setAttribute(panelID, 'active', 'true')
    else
        UIDisplaySwitch = false
        Global.UI.setAttribute(panelID, 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function showMoveButton(player_color, position, object)
    if Global.UI.getAttribute(moveButtonID, 'active') == 'false' then
        Global.UI.setAttribute(moveButtonID, 'active', 'true')
    else
        Global.UI.setAttribute(moveButtonID, 'active', 'false')
    end
end

function onDestroy()
    Global.UI.setAttribute(panelID, 'active', 'false')
end

function moveTimerUI(player, value, id)
    if id == 'bt_up' then
        UIoffsetY = UIoffsetY + 10
    elseif id == 'bt_down' then
        UIoffsetY = UIoffsetY - 10
    elseif id == 'bt_left' then
        UIoffsetX = UIoffsetX - 10
    elseif id == 'bt_right' then
        UIoffsetX = UIoffsetX + 10
    end
    self.setGMNotes(tostring(UIoffsetX)..','..tostring(UIoffsetY))
    updateDisplayButtons()
end

--Countdown Handling

--Start Countdown
function onCollisionEnter(collision_info)
    function onCollisionEnter_routine()
        --Avoids an error on startup
        if currentlyUp == nil then return end
        --Check if the tool's rotation match's its current memory of what it was
        if upsideDown() and currentlyUp or not upsideDown() and not currentlyUp then
            --Toggle which way is "up" for the current status
            currentlyUp = not currentlyUp
            --Kill any currently running coroutine and wait for it to be exectued
            if countdownRunning then
                killCountdown = true
                while killCountdown do
                    coroutine.yield(0)
                end
            end
            --Determine countdown amount based off of countdown mode
            if resetOnFlip then
                countdownRemaining = countdownGoal
            else
                countdownRemaining = countdownGoal - countdownRemaining
                if countdownRemaining == 0 then
                    countdownRemaining = countdownGoal
                end
            end

            --Initate countdown
            startLuaCoroutine(self, "countdown_routine")
        end
        return 1
    end
    startLuaCoroutine(self, "onCollisionEnter_routine")
end

--Runs countdown
function countdown_routine()
    countdownRunning = true
    local startTime = os.time()
    rotateDisplayButtons()
    
    while countdownRemaining > 0 do
        --Perform countdown step for this frame of the game
        local nowTime = os.time()
        local timeDelta = nowTime - startTime
        countdownRemaining = countdownRemaining - timeDelta
        updateDisplayButtons()
        startTime = nowTime
        
        --Perform color change step
        if fadeToggle then
            --fadeoutColor_start
            --fadeoutColor_end
            percentLeft = countdownRemaining / countdownGoal
            local r = fadeoutColor_end[1] + (fadeoutColor_offset[1] * percentLeft)
            local g = fadeoutColor_end[2] + (fadeoutColor_offset[2] * percentLeft)
            local b = fadeoutColor_end[3] + (fadeoutColor_offset[3] * percentLeft)
            self.setColorTint({r,g,b})
        end
        coroutine.yield(0)

        --Stall routine until pause is removed or it is killed
        while pauseCountdown do
            startTime = os.time()
            coroutine.yield(0)
            if killCountdown then break end
        end
        --Kills coroutine on-demand
        if killCountdown then
            killCountdown = nil
            countdownRunning = false
            return 1
        end
    end

    if announceToggle then broadcastToAll("Time's Up!", {1,1,1}) end
    self.AssetBundle.playTriggerEffect(0)
    countdownRunning = false
    return 1
end

--Reset and Pause



--Pauses countdown (countdown cannot continute until reset or unpaused)
function click_pause()
    pauseCountdown = not pauseCountdown
    pauseCountdownToggle()
end

--Resets tool
function click_reset()
    if countdownRunning then
        killCountdown = true
    end
    pauseCountdown = false
    pauseCountdownToggle()
    countdownRemaining = countdownGoal
    updateDisplayButtons()
end

function pauseCountdownToggle()
    if pauseCountdown then
        for i=0,3 do
            self.editButton({index=i, font_color={0.5,0.5,0.5}})
        end
    else
        for i=0,3 do
            self.editButton({index=i, font_color={1,1,1}})
        end
    end
end





--Settings buttons/inputs



--toggles between hourglass mode and reset mode
function click_toggleMode()
    resetOnFlip = not resetOnFlip

    --Mode toggle (hourglass or reset on flip)
    local label = string.char(8987)
    local tooltip = "[b]Hourglass Mode:[/b] Flipping timer over will 'reverse' the countdown."
    if resetOnFlip then
        label = string.char(8630)
        tooltip = "[b]Reset Mode:[/b] Flipping timer over will restart the countdown."
    end
    self.editButton({index=8, label=label, tooltip=tooltip})
    self.editButton({index=9, label=label, tooltip=tooltip})
end

--Toggles between announcing or not
function click_fadeToggle()
    fadeToggle = not fadeToggle

    --Update buttons
    local label = string.char(9788)
    local tooltip = "[b]Fadeout Mode Disabled[/b]\nThe color of the timer will not change."
    if fadeToggle then
        label = string.char(9790)
        tooltip = "[b]Fadeout Mode Enabled[/b]\nThe color of the timer will fade during countdown."
    end
    self.editButton({index=10, label=label, tooltip=tooltip})
    self.editButton({index=11, label=label, tooltip=tooltip})
end

--Handles inputting of new time
function input_time(_, color, inputString, stillEditing)
    if not stillEditing then
        local inputNum = tonumber(inputString)
        if type(inputNum) == "number" and inputNum ~= countdownGoal then
            countdownGoal = inputNum
            click_reset()
            printToAll(Player[color].steam_name .. " has updated the digital hourglass's time to "..countdownGoal.." seconds.", stringColorToRGB(color))
        else
            --Here in case I decide I want to broadcast an error for a blank timer
        end
        self.clearInputs()
        createTimeInputs()
    end
end








--Information finding and formatting



--Determines if this object is upside down (using rotation values)
function upsideDown()
    if self.getRotationValue() == "Digital Hourglass " then
        return true
    else
        return false
    end
end

--Formats seconds into readable time format
function formatSecondsForCountdown(seconds)
    local seconds = math.ceil(seconds)
    local hours = math.floor(seconds / 3600)
    local minutes = math.floor((seconds / 60) % 60)
    local seconds = seconds % 60

    s = ""
    if hours > 0 then
        minutes = string.format("%02d", minutes)
        seconds = string.format("%02d", seconds)
        s = hours .. ":" .. minutes .. ":" .. seconds
    else
        seconds = string.format("%02d", seconds)
        s = minutes .. ":" .. seconds
    end

    return s
end

-- Get real string lenght per char table
function getStringUnitWidth(str)
    local len = 0
    for i = 1, #str do
        local c = str:sub(i,i)
        if ref_charUnitWidth[c] then
            len = len + ref_charUnitWidth[c]
        else
            len = len + ref_charUnitWidth.avg
        end
    end
    return len
end



--Button creation



--Places the time numbers on the 4 faces
function createDisplayButtons()
    --Format time for display
    local cd_format = formatSecondsForCountdown(countdownRemaining)

    --Adjust font size if needed
    local font_size = 300
    if getStringUnitWidth(cd_format) > 10000 then font_size = 200 end

    --Adjust font color if needed
    local font_color = {1,1,1}
    if pauseCountdown then font_color = {0.5,0.5,0.5} end

    --Adjust rotation for if it is flipped or not
    local rot_offset = 0
    if upsideDown() then rot_offset = 180 end

    --Create 4 faces
    self.createButton({
        label=cd_format, click_function="n/a", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0,0.85}, height=0, width=0, font_size=font_size,
        font_color=font_color, rotation=ref_faceRotation[upsideDown()][1]
    })
    self.createButton({
        label=cd_format, click_function="n/a", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0,-0.85}, height=0, width=0, font_size=font_size,
        font_color=font_color, rotation=ref_faceRotation[upsideDown()][2]
    })
    self.createButton({
        label=cd_format, click_function="n/a", function_owner=self,
        position={-0.85,0,0}, height=0, width=0, font_size=font_size,
        font_color=font_color, rotation=ref_faceRotation[upsideDown()][3]
    })
    self.createButton({
        label=cd_format, click_function="n/a", function_owner=self,
        position={0.85,0,0}, height=0, width=0, font_size=font_size,
        font_color=font_color, rotation=ref_faceRotation[upsideDown()][4]
    })
end


prevS = ''
function updateDisplayButtons()
    --Format time for display
    local cd_format = formatSecondsForCountdown(countdownRemaining)
    local currentButtonData = self.getButtons()[1]
    local cd_old = currentButtonData.label

    if cd_format ~= cd_old then
        --Adjust font size if needed
        local font_size = 300
        if getStringUnitWidth(cd_format) > 10000 then font_size = 200 end

        --Edit 4 faces
        for i=0, 3 do
            self.editButton({
                index=i,
                label=cd_format,
                font_size=font_size,
                --rotation=ref_faceRotation[upsideDown()][i+1]
            })
        end
    end
    --Global UI timer display
    Global.UI.setAttribute(displayerID, 'text', s)
    Global.UI.setAttribute(displayerID, 'active', 'true')
    if currentGMNote ~= self.getGMNotes() then
        currentGMNote = self.getGMNotes()
        getUIoffsetXY()
        Global.UI.setAttribute(panelID, 'offsetXY', UIoffsetX .. ' ' .. UIoffsetY)
    end
    local tmpct = self.getColorTint()
    if currentColorTint.r ~= tmpct.r or currentColorTint.g ~= tmpct.g or currentColorTint.b ~= tmpct.b then
        currentColorTint.r = tmpct.r
        currentColorTint.g = tmpct.g
        currentColorTint.b = tmpct.b
        getColorCode()
        Global.UI.setAttribute(displayerID, 'outline', '#'..UIcolorCode)
    end

    if prevS ~= cd_format then
        prevS = cd_format
        if countdownRemaining <= 10 then
            Global.UI.show(displayerID)
        end
    end
end

function rotateDisplayButtons()
    for i=0, 3 do
        self.editButton({
            index=i,
            rotation=ref_faceRotation[upsideDown()][i+1]
        })
    end
end

    })

function splitNumbers(inputString)
    -- 입력값이 nil이거나 빈 문자열인 경우 처리
    if not inputString or inputString == "" then
        return nil, nil
    end
    
    -- 콤마를 기준으로 문자열 분리
    local parts = {}
    for part in string.gmatch(inputString, "[^,]+") do
        table.insert(parts, part)
    end
    
    -- 정확히 2개의 부분이 있는지 확인
    if #parts ~= 2 then
        return nil, nil
    end
    
    -- 앞뒤 공백 제거하고 숫자로 변환
    local num1 = tonumber(string.match(parts[1], "^%s*(.-)%s*$"))
    local num2 = tonumber(string.match(parts[2], "^%s*(.-)%s*$"))
    
    -- 숫자 변환이 실패한 경우 확인
    if not num1 then
        return nil, nil
    end
    if not num2 then
        return nil, nil
    end
    
    return num1, num2
end
function rgbToHex(r, g, b)
    -- 입력값을 0~1 범위로 클리핑
    r = math.max(0, math.min(1, r))
    g = math.max(0, math.min(1, g))
    b = math.max(0, math.min(1, b))
    
    -- 0~1 범위를 0~255 정수로 변환
    local r255 = math.floor(r * 255 + 0.5)  -- 반올림
    local g255 = math.floor(g * 255 + 0.5)
    local b255 = math.floor(b * 255 + 0.5)
    
    -- 16진수 문자열로 변환 (대문자, 2자리 패딩)
    return string.format("%02X%02X%02X", r255, g255, b255)
end
function getUIoffsetXY()
    local retnum1, retnum2 = splitNumbers(self.getGMNotes())
    if retnum1 == nil or retnum2 == nil then
        return
    else
        UIoffsetX = tostring(retnum1)
        UIoffsetY = tostring(retnum2)
    end
end
function getColorCode()
    local colorTable = self.getColorTint()
    UIcolorCode = rgbToHex(colorTable.r, colorTable.g, colorTable.b)
end



--Data tables

TableFloorGuid = {}
TableFloorGuid = {'4ee1f2', '9841e5', '9cdc1f', '0b2456', 'd6bcaf'}

function onLoad()
    self.UI.setAttribute('img1', 'image', getObjectFromGUID('4ee1f2').getCustomObject().diffuse)
    self.UI.setAttribute('img2', 'image', getObjectFromGUID('9841e5').getCustomObject().diffuse)
    self.UI.setAttribute('img3', 'image', getObjectFromGUID('9cdc1f').getCustomObject().diffuse)
    self.UI.setAttribute('img4', 'image', getObjectFromGUID('0b2456').getCustomObject().diffuse)
    self.UI.setAttribute('img5', 'image', getObjectFromGUID('d6bcaf').getCustomObject().diffuse)
end

function btClick(player, value, id)
    local code = string.gsub(id, 'bt', '')
    local num = tonumber(code)
    if num >= 1 and num <= 5 then
        player.showInputDialog("Image URL",
        function (url, player_color)
            local cobj = getObjectFromGUID(TableFloorGuid[num])
            if cobj == nil then
                return
            end

            local pr = cobj.getCustomObject()
            pr.diffuse = url
            cobj.setCustomObject(pr)
            cobj = cobj.reload()
            cobj.interactable = false
            self.UI.setAttribute('img'..code, 'image', url)
        end)
    end
end

autoHideSwitch = 0

btparams1 = {
    click_function = "hideObjects",

    position       = {0, 1, -0.25},
    rotation       = {0, 0, 0},

}
btparams2 = {
    click_function = "showObjects",
    function_owner = self,
    label          = "보이기",
    position       = {0, 1, 0},
    rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
    width          = 1100,

    click_function = "autoHideObjects",
    function_owner = self,
    label          = "자동 숨김",
    position       = {0, 1, 0.25},
    rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
    width          = 1100,
    height         = 330,
    font_size      = 180,
    scale          = {0.3, 0.3, 0.3},
    color          = {1, 1, 1},
    font_color     = {0, 0, 0},
    tooltip        = "계속 오브젝트를 숨깁니다.\n(새로운 오브젝트가 생기거나 description이 변경될 때에도 숨겨짐)",
}

function onLoad(script_state)
    local savedTable = JSON.decode(script_state)

    if savedTable ~= nil then
        if savedTable.AHS ~= nil then
            autoHideSwitch = savedTable.AHS
        end
    end
    if autoHideSwitch == 0 then
        hideObjects(self, 'Black', false)
    end
    self.createButton(btparams1)
    self.createButton(btparams2)
    self.createButton(btparams3)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        AHS = autoHideSwitch
    }
    return JSON.encode(state)
end

function hideObjects(obj, color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then
        return
    end
    if color ~= 'Black' and color ~= nil then
        if Player[color].host == false and Player[color].promoted == false and Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('검정색 플레이어 또는 호스트나 프로모트 플레이어만이 조정할 수 있습니다.')
            return
        end
    end
    
    if autoHideSwitch == 1 then
        if Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 꺼집니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
        end
        autoHideSwitch = 0
    end
    self.setColorTint({0, 0, 1})
    if Player[color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('개인 오브젝트를 숨깁니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
    end
    hideObjects_func()
end

function showObjects(obj, color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then
        return
    end
    if color ~= 'Black' and color ~= nil then
        if Player[color].host == false and Player[color].promoted == false and Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('검정색 플레이어 또는 호스트나 프로모트 플레이어만이 조정할 수 있습니다.')
            return
        end
    end

    local gmzone_guid = '0e399c'
    local tmpObjects = getObjects()
    local desc
    if autoHideSwitch == 1 then
        if Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 꺼집니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
        end
        autoHideSwitch = 0
    end
    self.setColorTint({0, 0, 0})
    if Player[color].seated == true then
        broadcastToColor('개인 오브젝트 숨김을 해제합니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
    end
    for i = 1, #tmpObjects do
        desc = string.lower(tmpObjects[i].getDescription())
        if string.find(desc, 'show:') then
            local oZones = tmpObjects[i].getZones()
            local brksw = 0
            for j = 1, #oZones do
                if oZones[j].guid == gmzone_guid then
                    brksw = 1
                    break
                end
            end
            if brksw == 0 then
                tmpObjects[i].setInvisibleTo({})
            end
        end
    end
end

function autoHideObjects(obj, color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then
        return
    end
    if color ~= 'Black' and color ~= nil then
        if Player[color].host == false and Player[color].promoted == false and Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('검정색 플레이어 또는 호스트나 프로모트 플레이어만이 조정할 수 있습니다.')
            return
        end
    end

    if autoHideSwitch == 0 then
        if Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 켜집니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
        end
        autoHideSwitch = 1
        self.setColorTint({0, 0.5, 0})
    else
        if Player[color].seated == true then
            broadcastToColor('자동 숨김이 꺼집니다.', color, {0, 1, 0})
        end
        autoHideSwitch = 0
        self.setColorTint({0, 0, 1})
    end
end


function hideObjects_func()
    local gmzone_guid = '0e399c'
    local tmpObjects = getObjects()
    local desc
    for i = 1, #tmpObjects do
        desc = string.lower(tmpObjects[i].getDescription())
        local allColors = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
        local hideColors = {}
        if string.find(desc, 'show:') then
            local oZones = tmpObjects[i].getZones()
            local brksw = 0
            for j = 1, #oZones do
                if oZones[j].guid == gmzone_guid then
                    brksw = 1
                    break
                end
            end
            if brksw == 0 then
                for j = 1, #allColors do
                    if string.find(desc, string.lower(allColors[j])) == nil then
                        hideColors[#hideColors + 1] = allColors[j]
                    end
                end
                tmpObjects[i].setInvisibleTo(hideColors)
            end
        end
    end
end


function onFixedUpdate()
    if autoHideSwitch == 1 then
        hideObjects_func()
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: ScriptingTrigger
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function setHiddenByZone(object)
    local objZones = object.getZones()
    local hideFrom = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
    local zoneDesc
    local zoneCount = 0
    if string.find(object.getDescription(), 'nohide') or string.find(object.getName(), 'nohide') or string.find(object.getGMNotes(), 'nohide') then
        return
    end
    for i = 1, #objZones do
        zoneDesc = objZones[i].getDescription()
        if objZones[i].getName() == 'coverzone' then
            zoneCount = zoneCount + 1
            for j = 1, #hideFrom do
                if string.find(zoneDesc, hideFrom[j]) then
                    hideFrom[j] = 'Grey'
                end
            end
        end
    end
    if zoneCount == 0 then
        object.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        object.setHiddenFrom(hideFrom)
    end
end
function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if zone == self then
        setHiddenByZone(object)
    end
end
function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if zone == self then
        setHiddenByZone(object)
    end
end
function onLoad()
    local tmpobjs = self.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #tmpobjs do
        setHiddenByZone(tmpobjs[i])
    end
end

function userFunction(obj, color, alt_click)
    local mainZone = getObjectFromGUID('1f2b6b')
    local objs = mainZone.getObjects()
    local tpos
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '캐릭터 공개정보' then
            tpos = objs[i].getPosition()
            if tpos.y > 0 then
                tpos.y = tpos.y - 40
            else
                tpos.y = tpos.y + 40
            end
            objs[i].setPosition(tpos)
        elseif objs[i].getName() == '캐릭터 선택' then
            tpos = objs[i].getPosition()
            if tpos.y > 0 then
                tpos.y = tpos.y - 40
            else
                tpos.y = tpos.y + 40
            end
            objs[i].setPosition(tpos)
        end
    end
end
