blackboard = {}
whiteboard = {}
figurine = {}

function onLoad()
    local btcolor = self.getDescription()
    local tooltiptext
    tooltiptext = self.getName()
    self.tooltip = true
    if btcolor ~= 'White' and btcolor ~= 'Brown' and btcolor ~= 'Red' and btcolor ~= 'Orange' and btcolor ~= 'Yellow'
        and btcolor ~= 'Green' and btcolor ~= 'Blue' and btcolor ~= 'Purple' and btcolor ~= 'Pink' and btcolor ~= 'Teal' then
        self.setColorTint({1, 1, 1})
        btcolor = {0.2, 0.2, 0.2}
        self.createButton({position={x=0, y=1, z=0}, scale={4, 4, 4}, color=btcolor, 
        click_function='userFunction', function_owner=self, tooltip=tooltiptext})
    else
        self.createButton({position={x=0, y=1, z=0}, scale={4, 4, 4}, color=btcolor, 
        click_function='userFunction', function_owner=self, tooltip=tooltiptext})
        self.setColorTint(btcolor)
    end
    
    blackboard[1] = getObjectFromGUID('339948')
    blackboard[2] = getObjectFromGUID('c3b214')
    blackboard[3] = getObjectFromGUID('2c3052')
    blackboard[4] = getObjectFromGUID('4418d1')
    blackboard[5] = getObjectFromGUID('415cee')
    blackboard[6] = getObjectFromGUID('0a5a65')
    blackboard[7] = getObjectFromGUID('5cf033')
    blackboard[8] = getObjectFromGUID('162a45')
    whiteboard[1] = getObjectFromGUID('365f80')
    whiteboard[2] = getObjectFromGUID('847719')
    whiteboard[3] = getObjectFromGUID('e7cb6b')
    whiteboard[4] = getObjectFromGUID('a41bdb')
    whiteboard[5] = getObjectFromGUID('01458b')
    whiteboard[6] = getObjectFromGUID('a3daa2')
    whiteboard[7] = getObjectFromGUID('880245')
    whiteboard[8] = getObjectFromGUID('f19b01')
    figurine[1] = getObjectFromGUID('2fb724')
    figurine[2] = getObjectFromGUID('ab6d67')
    figurine[3] = getObjectFromGUID('17391f')
    figurine[4] = getObjectFromGUID('fd71ca')
    figurine[5] = getObjectFromGUID('cf8048')
    figurine[6] = getObjectFromGUID('55af25')
    figurine[7] = getObjectFromGUID('b5cdbd')
    figurine[8] = getObjectFromGUID('8d75cd')
end


function userFunction(obj, color, alt_click)
    if color == 'Black' or color == 'Grey' then
        return
    end
    local pcNameOfColor = Global.call('externGetTable', 'pcNameOfColor')
    if pcNameOfColor[color] ~= nil then
        return
    end
    local InfoTile = {}
    local InfoTilePicked = nil
    local objGUIDList = {'51c20f', '61ee49', 'a75996', 'fd748a', 'abb446', 'b08354', '971576', 'e83305'}
    local pcName = ''
    for i = 1, #objGUIDList do
        if getObjectFromGUID(objGUIDList[i]) ~= nil then
            InfoTile[#InfoTile + 1] = getObjectFromGUID(objGUIDList[i])
        end
    end
    
    for i = 1, #InfoTile do
        local tx = InfoTile[i].getPosition().x
        local tz = InfoTile[i].getPosition().z
        if (math.abs(self.getPosition().x - tx)) < 1.0 and tz > -25 then
            local portobj = findObject('Portrait', InfoTile[i].getGMNotes(), nil)
            if portobj ~= nil then
                local cobj = portobj.getCustomObject()
                Global.call('externChangeFigurineImg', {t_color = color, t_imgUrl = cobj.image_secondary})
            end
            pcName = InfoTile[i].getGMNotes()
            InfoTilePicked = InfoTile[i]
            self.destroyObject()
            break
        end
    end
    
    Global.call('externPlayerRegister', {t_name = pcName, t_color = color, t_infoTile = InfoTilePicked})

    if findObject('캐릭터 선택', nil, nil) == nil then
        Wait.time(function ()
            for i = 1, 8 do
                local cp = findObject('ColorSelectionPanel', 'pc'..tostring(i), 'nohide')
                if cp ~= nil then
                    blackboard[i].destroyObject()
                    whiteboard[i].destroyObject()
                    if figurine[i] ~= nil then
                        figurine[i].destroyObject()
                    end
                    cp.destroyObject()
                end
            end
        end, 1)
    end
end

function externUserFunction(params)
    return userFunction(params.t_obj, params.t_color, params.t_alt_click)
end

function findObject(name, description, gmnote)
    local objs = getObjects()
    if name == nil and description == nil and gmnote == nil then
        return nil
    end
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if (objs[i].getName() == name or name == nil) and (objs[i].getDescription() == description or description == nil) and (objs[i].getGMNotes() == gmnote or gmnote == nil) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: ScriptingTrigger
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function setHiddenByZone(object)
    local objZones = object.getZones()
    local hideFrom = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
    local zoneDesc
    local zoneCount = 0
    if string.find(object.getDescription(), 'nohide') or string.find(object.getName(), 'nohide') or string.find(object.getGMNotes(), 'nohide') then
        return
    end
    for i = 1, #objZones do
        zoneDesc = objZones[i].getDescription()
        if objZones[i].getName() == 'coverzone' then
            zoneCount = zoneCount + 1
            for j = 1, #hideFrom do
                if string.find(zoneDesc, hideFrom[j]) then
                    hideFrom[j] = 'Grey'
                end
            end
        end
    end
    if zoneCount == 0 then
        object.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        object.setHiddenFrom(hideFrom)
    end
end
function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if zone == self then
        setHiddenByZone(object)
    end
end
function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if zone == self then
        setHiddenByZone(object)
    end
end
function onLoad()
    local tmpobjs = self.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #tmpobjs do
        setHiddenByZone(tmpobjs[i])
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Bag
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function updateSave()
    local data_to_save = {["ml"]=memoryList}
    saved_data = JSON.encode(data_to_save)
    self.script_state = saved_data
end

function onload(saved_data)
    if saved_data ~= "" then
        local loaded_data = JSON.decode(saved_data)
        --Set up information off of loaded_data
        memoryList = loaded_data.ml
    else
        --Set up information for if there is no saved saved data
        memoryList = {}
    end

    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        createSetupButton()
    else
        createMemoryActionButtons()
    end

    self.setColorTint('Green')
end


--Beginning Setup


--Make setup button
function createSetupButton()
    self.createButton({
        label="Setup", click_function="buttonClick_setup", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end

--Triggered by setup button,
function buttonClick_setup()
    memoryListBackup = duplicateTable(memoryList)
    memoryList = {}
    self.clearButtons()
    createButtonsOnAllObjects()
    createSetupActionButtons()
end

--Creates selection buttons on objects
function createButtonsOnAllObjects()
    local howManyButtons = 0
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj ~= self then
            local dummyIndex = howManyButtons
            --On a normal bag, the button positions aren't the same size as the bag.
            globalScaleFactor = 1.25 * 1/self.getScale().x
            --Super sweet math to set button positions
            local selfPos = self.getPosition()
            local objPos = obj.getPosition()
            local deltaPos = findOffsetDistance(selfPos, objPos, obj)
            local objPos = rotateLocalCoordinates(deltaPos, self)
            objPos.x = -objPos.x * globalScaleFactor
            objPos.y = objPos.y * globalScaleFactor
            objPos.z = objPos.z * globalScaleFactor
            --Offset rotation of bag
            local rot = self.getRotation()
            rot.y = -rot.y + 180
            --Create function
            local funcName = "selectButton_" .. howManyButtons
            local func = function() buttonClick_selection(dummyIndex, obj) end
            self.setVar(funcName, func)
            self.createButton({
                click_function=funcName, function_owner=self,
                position=objPos, rotation=rot, height=1000, width=1000,
                color={0.75,0.25,0.25,0.6},
            })
            howManyButtons = howManyButtons + 1
        end
    end
end

--Creates submit and cancel buttons
function createSetupActionButtons()
    self.createButton({
        label="Cancel", click_function="buttonClick_cancel", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=1100,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Submit", click_function="buttonClick_submit", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2.8}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=1100,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Reset", click_function="buttonClick_reset", function_owner=self,
        position={-2,0.3,0}, rotation={0,270,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end


--During Setup


--Checks or unchecks buttons
function buttonClick_selection(index, obj)
    local color = {0,1,0,0.6}
    if memoryList[obj.getGUID()] == nil then
        self.editButton({index=index, color=color})
        --Adding pos/rot to memory table
        local pos, rot = obj.getPosition(), obj.getRotation()
        --I need to add it like this or it won't save due to indexing issue
        memoryList[obj.getGUID()] = {
            pos={x=round(pos.x,4), y=round(pos.y,4), z=round(pos.z,4)},
            rot={x=round(rot.x,4), y=round(rot.y,4), z=round(rot.z,4)},
            lock=obj.getLock()
        }
        obj.highlightOn({0,1,0})
    else
        color = {0.75,0.25,0.25,0.6}
        self.editButton({index=index, color=color})
        memoryList[obj.getGUID()] = nil
        obj.highlightOff()
    end
end

--Cancels selection process
function buttonClick_cancel()
    memoryList = memoryListBackup
    self.clearButtons()
    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        createSetupButton()
    else
        createMemoryActionButtons()
    end
    removeAllHighlights()
    broadcastToAll("Selection Canceled", {1,1,1})
end

--Saves selections
function buttonClick_submit()
    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        broadcastToAll("You cannot submit without any selections.", {0.75, 0.25, 0.25})
    else
        self.clearButtons()
        createMemoryActionButtons()
        local count = 0
        for guid in pairs(memoryList) do
            count = count + 1
            local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
            if obj ~= nil then obj.highlightOff() end
        end
        broadcastToAll(count.." Objects Saved", {1,1,1})
        updateSave()
    end
end

--Resets bag to starting status
function buttonClick_reset()
    memoryList = {}
    self.clearButtons()
    createSetupButton()
    removeAllHighlights()
    broadcastToAll("Tool Reset", {1,1,1})
    updateSave()
end


--After Setup


--Creates recall and place buttons
function createMemoryActionButtons()
    self.createButton({
        label="Place", click_function="buttonClick_place", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Recall", click_function="buttonClick_recall", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2.8}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Setup", click_function="buttonClick_setup", function_owner=self,
        position={-2,0.3,0}, rotation={0,270,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end

--Sends objects from bag/table to their saved position/rotation
function buttonClick_place()
    local bagObjList = self.getObjects()
    for guid, entry in pairs(memoryList) do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
        --If obj is out on the table, move it to the saved pos/rot
        if obj ~= nil then
            obj.setPositionSmooth(entry.pos)
            obj.setRotationSmooth(entry.rot)
            obj.setLock(entry.lock)
        else
            --If obj is inside of the bag
            for _, bagObj in ipairs(bagObjList) do
                if bagObj.guid == guid then
                    local item = self.takeObject({
                        guid=guid, position=entry.pos, rotation=entry.rot,
                    })
                    item.setLock(entry.lock)
                    break
                end
            end
        end
    end
    broadcastToAll("Objects Placed", {1,1,1})
    self.setColorTint('Red')
    Global.call('externForbidOnesOwnCard')
end

--Recalls objects to bag from table
function buttonClick_recall()
    for guid, entry in pairs(memoryList) do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
        if obj ~= nil then self.putObject(obj) end
    end
    broadcastToAll("Objects Recalled", {1,1,1})
    self.setColorTint('Green')
end


--Utility functions


--Find delta (difference) between 2 x/y/z coordinates
function findOffsetDistance(p1, p2, obj)
    local deltaPos = {}
    local bounds = obj.getBounds()
    deltaPos.x = (p2.x-p1.x)
    deltaPos.y = (p2.y-p1.y) + (bounds.size.y - bounds.offset.y)
    deltaPos.z = (p2.z-p1.z)
    return deltaPos
end

--Used to rotate a set of coordinates by an angle
function rotateLocalCoordinates(desiredPos, obj)
	local objPos, objRot = obj.getPosition(), obj.getRotation()
    local angle = math.rad(objRot.y)
	local x = desiredPos.x * math.cos(angle) - desiredPos.z * math.sin(angle)
	local z = desiredPos.x * math.sin(angle) + desiredPos.z * math.cos(angle)
	--return {x=objPos.x+x, y=objPos.y+desiredPos.y, z=objPos.z+z}
    return {x=x, y=desiredPos.y, z=z}
end

--Coroutine delay, in seconds
function wait(time)
    local start = os.time()
    repeat coroutine.yield(0) until os.time() > start + time
end

--Duplicates a table (needed to prevent it making reference to the same objects)
function duplicateTable(oldTable)
    local newTable = {}
    for k, v in pairs(oldTable) do
        newTable[k] = v
    end
    return newTable
end

--Moves scripted highlight from all objects
function removeAllHighlights()
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        obj.highlightOff()
    end
end

--Round number (num) to the Nth decimal (dec)
function round(num, dec)
  local mult = 10^(dec or 0)
  return math.floor(num * mult + 0.5) / mult
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    local mainzone = getObjectFromGUID('1f2b6b')
    local colorList = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink'}
    local objs = mainzone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '캐릭터 선택' then
            if objs[i].getDescription() == '' then
                for j = 1, #colorList do
                    self.UI.setAttribute('colorChoice'..colorList[j], 'active', 'true')
                end
                break
            elseif contains(colorList, objs[i].getDescription()) then
                self.UI.setAttribute('colorChoice'..objs[i].getDescription(), 'active', 'true')
            end
        end 
    end
end

function colorChoiceButton(player, value, id)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == self.getName() then
            objs[i].UI.setAttribute(id, 'active', 'false')
        end
    end
    local color = string.gsub(id, 'colorChoice', '')
    Global.call('externChooseColor', {t_player = player, t_color = color, t_position = self.getPosition(), t_pcName = self.getDescription()})
    self.destroyObject()
end

function contains(table, value)
    for i, v in ipairs(table) do
        if v == value then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function onLoad()
    local mainzone = getObjectFromGUID('1f2b6b')
    local colorList = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink'}
    local objs = mainzone.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == '캐릭터 선택' then
            if objs[i].getDescription() == '' then
                for j = 1, #colorList do
                    self.UI.setAttribute('colorChoice'..colorList[j], 'active', 'true')
                end
                break
            elseif contains(colorList, objs[i].getDescription()) then
                self.UI.setAttribute('colorChoice'..objs[i].getDescription(), 'active', 'true')
            end
        end 
    end
end

function colorChoiceButton(player, value, id)
    local objs = getObjects()
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if objs[i].getName() == self.getName() then
            objs[i].UI.setAttribute(id, 'active', 'false')
        end
    end
    local color = string.gsub(id, 'colorChoice', '')
    Global.call('externChooseColor', {t_player = player, t_color = color, t_position = self.getPosition(), t_pcName = self.getDescription()})
    self.destroyObject()
end

function contains(table, value)
    for i, v in ipairs(table) do
        if v == value then
            return true
        end
    end
    return false
end

ObjectStates.Name: ScriptingTrigger
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function setHiddenByZone(object)
    local objZones = object.getZones()
    local hideFrom = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
    local zoneDesc
    local zoneCount = 0
    if string.find(object.getDescription(), 'nohide') or string.find(object.getName(), 'nohide') or string.find(object.getGMNotes(), 'nohide') then
        return
    end
    for i = 1, #objZones do
        zoneDesc = objZones[i].getDescription()
        if objZones[i].getName() == 'coverzone' then
            zoneCount = zoneCount + 1
            for j = 1, #hideFrom do
                if string.find(zoneDesc, hideFrom[j]) then
                    hideFrom[j] = 'Grey'
                end
            end
        end
    end
    if zoneCount == 0 then
        object.setHiddenFrom({})
    else
        object.setHiddenFrom(hideFrom)
    end
end
function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if zone == self then
        setHiddenByZone(object)
    end
end
function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if zone == self then
        setHiddenByZone(object)
    end
end
function onLoad()
    local tmpobjs = self.getObjects()
    for i = 1, #tmpobjs do
        setHiddenByZone(tmpobjs[i])
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Bag
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
function updateSave()
    local data_to_save = {["ml"]=memoryList}
    saved_data = JSON.encode(data_to_save)
    self.script_state = saved_data
end

function onload(saved_data)
    if saved_data ~= "" then
        local loaded_data = JSON.decode(saved_data)
        --Set up information off of loaded_data
        memoryList = loaded_data.ml
    else
        --Set up information for if there is no saved saved data
        memoryList = {}
    end

    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        createSetupButton()
    else
        createMemoryActionButtons()
    end

    self.setColorTint('Green')
end


--Beginning Setup


--Make setup button
function createSetupButton()
    self.createButton({
        label="Setup", click_function="buttonClick_setup", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end

--Triggered by setup button,
function buttonClick_setup()
    memoryListBackup = duplicateTable(memoryList)
    memoryList = {}
    self.clearButtons()
    createButtonsOnAllObjects()
    createSetupActionButtons()
end

--Creates selection buttons on objects
function createButtonsOnAllObjects()
    local howManyButtons = 0
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        if obj ~= self then
            local dummyIndex = howManyButtons
            --On a normal bag, the button positions aren't the same size as the bag.
            globalScaleFactor = 1.25 * 1/self.getScale().x
            --Super sweet math to set button positions
            local selfPos = self.getPosition()
            local objPos = obj.getPosition()
            local deltaPos = findOffsetDistance(selfPos, objPos, obj)
            local objPos = rotateLocalCoordinates(deltaPos, self)
            objPos.x = -objPos.x * globalScaleFactor
            objPos.y = objPos.y * globalScaleFactor
            objPos.z = objPos.z * globalScaleFactor
            --Offset rotation of bag
            local rot = self.getRotation()
            rot.y = -rot.y + 180
            --Create function
            local funcName = "selectButton_" .. howManyButtons
            local func = function() buttonClick_selection(dummyIndex, obj) end
            self.setVar(funcName, func)
            self.createButton({
                click_function=funcName, function_owner=self,
                position=objPos, rotation=rot, height=1000, width=1000,
                color={0.75,0.25,0.25,0.6},
            })
            howManyButtons = howManyButtons + 1
        end
    end
end

--Creates submit and cancel buttons
function createSetupActionButtons()
    self.createButton({
        label="Cancel", click_function="buttonClick_cancel", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=1100,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Submit", click_function="buttonClick_submit", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2.8}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=1100,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Reset", click_function="buttonClick_reset", function_owner=self,
        position={-2,0.3,0}, rotation={0,270,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end


--During Setup


--Checks or unchecks buttons
function buttonClick_selection(index, obj)
    local color = {0,1,0,0.6}
    if memoryList[obj.getGUID()] == nil then
        self.editButton({index=index, color=color})
        --Adding pos/rot to memory table
        local pos, rot = obj.getPosition(), obj.getRotation()
        --I need to add it like this or it won't save due to indexing issue
        memoryList[obj.getGUID()] = {
            pos={x=round(pos.x,4), y=round(pos.y,4), z=round(pos.z,4)},
            rot={x=round(rot.x,4), y=round(rot.y,4), z=round(rot.z,4)},
            lock=obj.getLock()
        }
        obj.highlightOn({0,1,0})
    else
        color = {0.75,0.25,0.25,0.6}
        self.editButton({index=index, color=color})
        memoryList[obj.getGUID()] = nil
        obj.highlightOff()
    end
end

--Cancels selection process
function buttonClick_cancel()
    memoryList = memoryListBackup
    self.clearButtons()
    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        createSetupButton()
    else
        createMemoryActionButtons()
    end
    removeAllHighlights()
    broadcastToAll("Selection Canceled", {1,1,1})
end

--Saves selections
function buttonClick_submit()
    if next(memoryList) == nil then
        broadcastToAll("You cannot submit without any selections.", {0.75, 0.25, 0.25})
    else
        self.clearButtons()
        createMemoryActionButtons()
        local count = 0
        for guid in pairs(memoryList) do
            count = count + 1
            local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
            if obj ~= nil then obj.highlightOff() end
        end
        broadcastToAll(count.." Objects Saved", {1,1,1})
        updateSave()
    end
end

--Resets bag to starting status
function buttonClick_reset()
    memoryList = {}
    self.clearButtons()
    createSetupButton()
    removeAllHighlights()
    broadcastToAll("Tool Reset", {1,1,1})
    updateSave()
end


--After Setup


--Creates recall and place buttons
function createMemoryActionButtons()
    self.createButton({
        label="Place", click_function="buttonClick_place", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Recall", click_function="buttonClick_recall", function_owner=self,
        position={0,0.3,-2.8}, rotation={0,180,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
    self.createButton({
        label="Setup", click_function="buttonClick_setup", function_owner=self,
        position={-2,0.3,0}, rotation={0,270,0}, height=350, width=800,
        font_size=250, color={0,0,0}, font_color={1,1,1}
    })
end

--Sends objects from bag/table to their saved position/rotation
function buttonClick_place()
    local bagObjList = self.getObjects()
    for guid, entry in pairs(memoryList) do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
        --If obj is out on the table, move it to the saved pos/rot
        if obj ~= nil then
            obj.setPositionSmooth(entry.pos)
            obj.setRotationSmooth(entry.rot)
            obj.setLock(entry.lock)
        else
            --If obj is inside of the bag
            for _, bagObj in ipairs(bagObjList) do
                if bagObj.guid == guid then
                    local item = self.takeObject({
                        guid=guid, position=entry.pos, rotation=entry.rot,
                    })
                    item.setLock(entry.lock)
                    break
                end
            end
        end
    end
    broadcastToAll("Objects Placed", {1,1,1})
    self.setColorTint('Red')
    Global.call('externForbidOnesOwnCard')
end

--Recalls objects to bag from table
function buttonClick_recall()
    for guid, entry in pairs(memoryList) do
        local obj = getObjectFromGUID(guid)
        if obj ~= nil then self.putObject(obj) end
    end
    broadcastToAll("Objects Recalled", {1,1,1})
    self.setColorTint('Green')
end


--Utility functions


--Find delta (difference) between 2 x/y/z coordinates
function findOffsetDistance(p1, p2, obj)
    local deltaPos = {}
    local bounds = obj.getBounds()
    deltaPos.x = (p2.x-p1.x)
    deltaPos.y = (p2.y-p1.y) + (bounds.size.y - bounds.offset.y)
    deltaPos.z = (p2.z-p1.z)
    return deltaPos
end

--Used to rotate a set of coordinates by an angle
function rotateLocalCoordinates(desiredPos, obj)
	local objPos, objRot = obj.getPosition(), obj.getRotation()
    local angle = math.rad(objRot.y)
	local x = desiredPos.x * math.cos(angle) - desiredPos.z * math.sin(angle)
	local z = desiredPos.x * math.sin(angle) + desiredPos.z * math.cos(angle)
	--return {x=objPos.x+x, y=objPos.y+desiredPos.y, z=objPos.z+z}
    return {x=x, y=desiredPos.y, z=z}
end

--Coroutine delay, in seconds
function wait(time)
    local start = os.time()
    repeat coroutine.yield(0) until os.time() > start + time
end

--Duplicates a table (needed to prevent it making reference to the same objects)
function duplicateTable(oldTable)
    local newTable = {}
    for k, v in pairs(oldTable) do
        newTable[k] = v
    end
    return newTable
end

--Moves scripted highlight from all objects
function removeAllHighlights()
    for _, obj in ipairs(getAllObjects()) do
        obj.highlightOff()
    end
end

--Round number (num) to the Nth decimal (dec)
function round(num, dec)
  local mult = 10^(dec or 0)
  return math.floor(num * mult + 0.5) / mult
end

ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
-- Automatically added

userColorList = {}
userColorList[1] = 'White'
userColorList[2] = 'Brown'
userColorList[3] = 'Red'
userColorList[4] = 'Orange'
userColorList[5] = 'Yellow'
userColorList[6] = 'Green'
userColorList[7] = 'Teal'
userColorList[8] = 'Blue'
userColorList[9] = 'Purple'
userColorList[10] = 'Pink'
userColorList[11] = 'Black'

peekable = {}
peekable[userColorList[1]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[2]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[3]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[4]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[5]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[6]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[7]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[8]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[9]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[10]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[11]] = 1

ownedBy = nil
messageStandby = true
isHidden = 0
cardName = ''
etcMemo = ''
colorRestriction = ''
isAvailable = true
permitOK = false
requireToken = 1
forOpenToAll = false
isPublic = false
callbackCode = ''

function onLoad(script_state)
    self.setSnapPoints({
        {
            position = {0, 0, 0},
            tags = {"ChesterToken"}
        }
    })
    local state = nil
    if script_state ~= nil then
        state = JSON.decode(script_state)
    end
    if state ~= nil then
        isHidden = state.s_isHidden
        cardName = state.s_cardName
        etcMemo = state.s_etcMemo
        colorRestriction = state.s_colorRestriction
        isAvailable = state.s_isAvailable
        requireToken = state.s_requireToken
        forOpenToAll = state.s_forOpenToAll
        isPublic = state.s_isPublic
        callbackCode = state.s_callbackCode

        if cardName == nil then
            cardName = ''
        end
        if etcMemo == nil then
            etcMemo = ''
        end
        if colorRestriction == nil then
            colorRestriction = ''
        end
        if isAvailable == nil then
            isAvailable = true
        end
        for i = 1, 10 do
            peekable[userColorList[i]] = state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]]
        end
        if requireToken == nil then requireToken = 1 end
        if callbackCode == nil then
            callbackCode = ''
        end
    end

    if isHidden == 1 then
        self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
    end

    self.addContextMenuItem("카드설정 (GM)", openConfiguration)
    self.addContextMenuItem("획득제한해제(주의!)", permitThisCard, true)
    self.UI.setXml(self.UI.getXml() .. XML_SCRIPT)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        s_isHidden = isHidden,
        s_cardName = cardName,
        s_etcMemo = etcMemo,
        s_colorRestriction = colorRestriction,
        s_isAvailable = isAvailable,
        s_requireToken = requireToken,
        s_forOpenToAll = forOpenToAll,
        s_isPublic = isPublic,
        s_callbackCode = callbackCode,
        s_peekable = {}
    }
    for i = 1, 11 do
        state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]] = peekable[userColorList[i]]
    end
    return JSON.encode_pretty(state)
end

function setIsHidden(input)
    isHidden = input
end

function externCaller(parameters)
    local nArguments = #parameters
    if _G[parameters[1]] ~= nil then
        if nArguments == 1 then
            _G[parameters[1]]()
        elseif nArguments == 2 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2])
        elseif nArguments == 3 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3])
        elseif nArguments == 4 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4])
        elseif nArguments == 5 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5])
        elseif nArguments == 6 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6])
        elseif nArguments == 7 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6], parameters[7])
        end
    end
end

function deliverCard(tcolor, tokenObj, cBag)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
    end
    ownedBy = tcolor
    if tokenObj ~= nil then
        tokenObj.destroyObject()
    end

    if requireToken > 1 then
        local removeCount = requireToken - 1
        local objs = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #objs do
            if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                    if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                        removeCount = removeCount - 1
                        objs[i].destroyObject()
                        if removeCount == 0 then
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    isHidden = 0
    self.use_hands = true
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('takeListAdd', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=tcolor})
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false then
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then return end
        if Player[tcolor].seated == true then
            if tcolor == 'Black' then
                broadcastToColor('카드가 전체공개 되었습니다.', tcolor)
            else
                broadcastToColor('이 카드는 소유할 수 없는 "보기전용" 공용 카드이므로, Alt+Shift를 이용해 보셔야 합니다.', tcolor)
            end
        end
        ownedBy = nil
        peekable[tcolor] = 1
        if tcolor ~= 'Black' then    
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                })
            end
        else
            ownedBy = 'Black'
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                })
            end
        end
    else
        if forOpenToAll == true then
            Wait.frames(function()
                broadcastToAll('이 카드는 전체 공개 카드입니다.', {1, 1, 0})
                if self.is_face_down == true then
                    self.flip()
                end
                if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                    callCallbackFunction({
                        cardGuid = self.guid,
                        cardName = cardName,
                        etcMemo = etcMemo,
                        callbackCode = callbackCode,
                        tcolor = tcolor,
                        peekable = peekable,
                        ownedBy = ownedBy,
                    })
                end
            end, 20)
        else
            if Player[tcolor].getHandCount() > 0 then
                Wait.frames(function()
                    self.deal(1, ownedBy, 1)
                    if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                        callCallbackFunction({
                            cardGuid = self.guid,
                            cardName = cardName,
                            etcMemo = etcMemo,
                            callbackCode = callbackCode,
                            tcolor = tcolor,
                            peekable = peekable,
                            ownedBy = ownedBy,
                        })
                    end
                end, 20)
            end
        end
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(collision)
    local tmpobj
    local tcolor = nil
    local cBag
    if collision == nil then return end
    if messageStandby == false then return end
    if ownedBy == nil then
        tmpobj = collision.collision_object
        if math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) > 0.1 or math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) > 0.1 then
            return
        end
        if string.find(tmpobj.getGMNotes(), 'Token:') then
            if isAvailable == false then
                messageWait('이 카드는 현재 획득할 수 없습니다.')
                return
            end
            for i = 1, 11 do
                if tmpobj.getGMNotes() == 'Token:' .. userColorList[i] then
                    tcolor = userColorList[i]
                    break
                end
            end
            if tcolor == nil then
                return
            else
                cBag = findChesterBag()
                if cBag.call('getRestrictMore') == 1 then
                    if restrictionCheck(tcolor) == false then
                        messageWait('같은 종류의 카드는 한 페이즈에 한 번만 가져갈 수 있습니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if cBag.call('getColorRestriction') == 1 and string.find(colorRestriction, tcolor) then
                    messageWait(tcolor..' 플레이어는 이 카드의 획득이 금지되어 있습니다.')
                    return
                end

                -- 토큰 수량 판정
                if requireToken > 1 then
                    local tokenCount = requireToken
                    local objs = getObjects()
                    for i = 1, #objs do
                        if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                            if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                                if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                                    tokenCount = tokenCount - 1
                                    if tokenCount == 0 then
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if tokenCount > 0 then
                        messageWait('이 카드의 획득을 위해서는 토큰 '..tostring(tokenCount)..'개(총 '..tostring(requireToken)..'개)가 더 필요합니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end

                deliverCard(tcolor, tmpobj, cBag)
            end
        else
            return
        end
    else
        return
    end
end

function byPluralToken(pobj)
    onCollisionEnter({collision_object = pobj})
end

function messageWait(broadcasting)
    messageStandby = false
    broadcastToAll(broadcasting, {1, 1, 0})
    Wait.frames(function() 
        messageStandby = true
    end, 50)
end

function onPeek(player_color)
    if isPublic == true and ownedBy ~= 'Black' then
        if peekable[player_color] == 0 then
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            broadcastToAll(player_color .. ' 플레이어가 카드를 멋대로 훔쳐봅니다.')
            Player[player_color].pingTable(self.getPosition())
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter()
    local cbag = findChesterBag()
    if cbag == nil then
        return false
    end
    if cbag.call('getValueNoMergeObject') == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function setOwnerByZone()
    if self.use_hands == false then
        return
    end
    local handed = 0
    local retPColor = nil
    local tmpobjs
    for i = 1, 11 do
        for j = 1, Player[userColorList[i]].getHandCount() do
            tmpobjs = Player[userColorList[i]].getHandObjects(j)
            for k = 1, #tmpobjs do
                if tmpobjs[k] == self then
                    if retPColor == nil then
                        retPColor = userColorList[i]
                    elseif retPColor ~= userColorList[i] then
                        return
                    end
                end
                break
            end
            if retPColor ~= nil then
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if retPColor ~= nil then
        ownedBy = retPColor
    end
end

function findChesterBag()
    local cbag = getObjectFromGUID('842fe7')
    if cbag == nil then
        local tobj = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #tobj do
            if tobj[i].getGMNotes() == 'CHESTER_BAG' then
                cbag = tobj[i]
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if cbag == nil then
        return nil
    else
        return cbag
    end
end

function callCallbackFunction(parameters)
    local cBag = findChesterBag()
    if cBag == nil then
        return
    else
        cBag.call('cardCallbackFunction', parameters)
    end
end

function restrictionCheck(pColor)
    local cBag = findChesterBag()
    local flag = cBag.call('getRestrictMore')
    if flag == 0 or flag == nil then
        return true
    end

    flag = cBag.call('tookSameCardAlready', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=pColor})
    if flag == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function openConfiguration(player_color, position, object)
    permitOK = false
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end

    if self.is_face_down == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '-150 0 -150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 0 180')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '150 0 150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 180 180')
    end

    local aspectRatio = self.getBoundsNormalized().size.x / self.getBoundsNormalized().size.z
    self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'scale', tostring(0.15 / aspectRatio)..' 0.22 0.1')

    if self.UI.getAttribute('configurationUI', 'active') == 'false' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'false')
    end

    if cardName ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_cardName', 'text', cardName)
    end
    if etcMemo ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text', etcMemo)
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text', tostring(requireToken))

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if string.find(colorRestriction, userColorList[i]) then
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'True')
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'False')
        end
    end
    if isAvailable == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if forOpenToAll == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if isPublic == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if callbackCode ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text', callbackCode)
    end
end

function ifEdit(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
end

function onoffChange(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'isOn', value)
end

function btclick(player, value, id)
    if id == 'save_configuration' then
        cardName = self.UI.getAttribute('input_cardName', 'text')
        etcMemo = self.UI.getAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text')
        colorRestriction = ''
        for i = 1, 10 do
            if self.UI.getAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn') == 'True' then
                colorRestriction = colorRestriction .. userColorList[i]
            end
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isAvailable = true
        else
            isAvailable = false
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            forOpenToAll = false
        else
            forOpenToAll = true
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isPublic = false
        else
            isPublic = true
        end
        requireToken = tonumber(self.UI.getAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text'))
        if requireToken == nil or requireToken < 1 then
            requireToken = 1
        end
        callbackCode = self.UI.getAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text')
        
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    elseif id == 'abort_configuration' then
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    end
end

function setAvailable(bool_input)
    isAvailable = bool_input
end

function getAvailable()
    return isAvailable
end

function setCardName(input)
    cardName = input
end

function getCardName()
    return cardName
end

function setEtcMemo(input)
    etcMemo = input
end

function getEtcMemo()
    return etcMemo
end

function getColorRestriction()
    return colorRestriction
end

function setColorRestriction(input)
    colorRestriction = input
end

function permitThisCard(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then return end
    if permitOK == false then
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한을 완전히 해제합니다. (카드의 이름도 삭제됩니다).\n한 번 더 누르면 적용됩니다.', 'Black')
        permitOK = true
    else
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한이 해제되었습니다.', 'Black')
        isAvailable = true
        messageStandby = true
        cardName = ''
        colorRestriction = ''
    end
end

function setCallbackCode(input)
    callbackCode = input
end

GM이 블랙 토큰을 넣는 경우 전체 공개</Text>

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
-- Automatically added

userColorList = {}
userColorList[1] = 'White'
userColorList[2] = 'Brown'
userColorList[3] = 'Red'
userColorList[4] = 'Orange'
userColorList[5] = 'Yellow'
userColorList[6] = 'Green'
userColorList[7] = 'Teal'
userColorList[8] = 'Blue'
userColorList[9] = 'Purple'
userColorList[10] = 'Pink'
userColorList[11] = 'Black'

peekable = {}
peekable[userColorList[1]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[2]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[3]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[4]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[5]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[6]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[7]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[8]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[9]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[10]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[11]] = 1

ownedBy = nil
messageStandby = true
isHidden = 0
cardName = ''
etcMemo = ''
colorRestriction = ''
isAvailable = true
permitOK = false
requireToken = 1
forOpenToAll = false
isPublic = false
callbackCode = ''

function onLoad(script_state)
    self.setSnapPoints({
        {
            position = {0, 0, 0},
            tags = {"ChesterToken"}
        }
    })
    local state = nil
    if script_state ~= nil then
        state = JSON.decode(script_state)
    end
    if state ~= nil then
        isHidden = state.s_isHidden
        cardName = state.s_cardName
        etcMemo = state.s_etcMemo
        colorRestriction = state.s_colorRestriction
        isAvailable = state.s_isAvailable
        requireToken = state.s_requireToken
        forOpenToAll = state.s_forOpenToAll
        isPublic = state.s_isPublic
        callbackCode = state.s_callbackCode

        if cardName == nil then
            cardName = ''
        end
        if etcMemo == nil then
            etcMemo = ''
        end
        if colorRestriction == nil then
            colorRestriction = ''
        end
        if isAvailable == nil then
            isAvailable = true
        end
        for i = 1, 10 do
            peekable[userColorList[i]] = state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]]
        end
        if requireToken == nil then requireToken = 1 end
        if callbackCode == nil then
            callbackCode = ''
        end
    end

    if isHidden == 1 then
        self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
    end

    self.addContextMenuItem("카드설정 (GM)", openConfiguration)
    self.addContextMenuItem("획득제한해제(주의!)", permitThisCard, true)
    self.UI.setXml(self.UI.getXml() .. XML_SCRIPT)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        s_isHidden = isHidden,
        s_cardName = cardName,
        s_etcMemo = etcMemo,
        s_colorRestriction = colorRestriction,
        s_isAvailable = isAvailable,
        s_requireToken = requireToken,
        s_forOpenToAll = forOpenToAll,
        s_isPublic = isPublic,
        s_callbackCode = callbackCode,
        s_peekable = {}
    }
    for i = 1, 11 do
        state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]] = peekable[userColorList[i]]
    end
    return JSON.encode_pretty(state)
end

function setIsHidden(input)
    isHidden = input
end

function externCaller(parameters)
    local nArguments = #parameters
    if _G[parameters[1]] ~= nil then
        if nArguments == 1 then
            _G[parameters[1]]()
        elseif nArguments == 2 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2])
        elseif nArguments == 3 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3])
        elseif nArguments == 4 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4])
        elseif nArguments == 5 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5])
        elseif nArguments == 6 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6])
        elseif nArguments == 7 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6], parameters[7])
        end
    end
end

function deliverCard(tcolor, tokenObj, cBag)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
    end
    ownedBy = tcolor
    if tokenObj ~= nil then
        tokenObj.destroyObject()
    end

    if requireToken > 1 then
        local removeCount = requireToken - 1
        local objs = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #objs do
            if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                    if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                        removeCount = removeCount - 1
                        objs[i].destroyObject()
                        if removeCount == 0 then
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    isHidden = 0
    self.use_hands = true
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('takeListAdd', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=tcolor})
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false then
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then return end
        if Player[tcolor].seated == true then
            if tcolor == 'Black' then
                broadcastToColor('카드가 전체공개 되었습니다.', tcolor)
            else
                broadcastToColor('이 카드는 소유할 수 없는 "보기전용" 공용 카드이므로, Alt+Shift를 이용해 보셔야 합니다.', tcolor)
            end
        end
        ownedBy = nil
        peekable[tcolor] = 1
        if tcolor ~= 'Black' then    
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                })
            end
        else
            ownedBy = 'Black'
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                })
            end
        end
    else
        if forOpenToAll == true then
            Wait.frames(function()
                broadcastToAll('이 카드는 전체 공개 카드입니다.', {1, 1, 0})
                if self.is_face_down == true then
                    self.flip()
                end
                if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                    callCallbackFunction({
                        cardGuid = self.guid,
                        cardName = cardName,
                        etcMemo = etcMemo,
                        callbackCode = callbackCode,
                        tcolor = tcolor,
                        peekable = peekable,
                        ownedBy = ownedBy,
                    })
                end
            end, 20)
        else
            if Player[tcolor].getHandCount() > 0 then
                Wait.frames(function()
                    self.deal(1, ownedBy, 1)
                    if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                        callCallbackFunction({
                            cardGuid = self.guid,
                            cardName = cardName,
                            etcMemo = etcMemo,
                            callbackCode = callbackCode,
                            tcolor = tcolor,
                            peekable = peekable,
                            ownedBy = ownedBy,
                        })
                    end
                end, 20)
            end
        end
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(collision)
    local tmpobj
    local tcolor = nil
    local cBag
    if collision == nil then return end
    if messageStandby == false then return end
    if ownedBy == nil then
        tmpobj = collision.collision_object
        if math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) > 0.1 or math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) > 0.1 then
            return
        end
        if string.find(tmpobj.getGMNotes(), 'Token:') then
            if isAvailable == false then
                messageWait('이 카드는 현재 획득할 수 없습니다.')
                return
            end
            for i = 1, 11 do
                if tmpobj.getGMNotes() == 'Token:' .. userColorList[i] then
                    tcolor = userColorList[i]
                    break
                end
            end
            if tcolor == nil then
                return
            else
                cBag = findChesterBag()
                if cBag.call('getRestrictMore') == 1 then
                    if restrictionCheck(tcolor) == false then
                        messageWait('같은 종류의 카드는 한 페이즈에 한 번만 가져갈 수 있습니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if cBag.call('getColorRestriction') == 1 and string.find(colorRestriction, tcolor) then
                    messageWait(tcolor..' 플레이어는 이 카드의 획득이 금지되어 있습니다.')
                    return
                end

                -- 토큰 수량 판정
                if requireToken > 1 then
                    local tokenCount = requireToken
                    local objs = getObjects()
                    for i = 1, #objs do
                        if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                            if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                                if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                                    tokenCount = tokenCount - 1
                                    if tokenCount == 0 then
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if tokenCount > 0 then
                        messageWait('이 카드의 획득을 위해서는 토큰 '..tostring(tokenCount)..'개(총 '..tostring(requireToken)..'개)가 더 필요합니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end

                deliverCard(tcolor, tmpobj, cBag)
            end
        else
            return
        end
    else
        return
    end
end

function byPluralToken(pobj)
    onCollisionEnter({collision_object = pobj})
end

function messageWait(broadcasting)
    messageStandby = false
    broadcastToAll(broadcasting, {1, 1, 0})
    Wait.frames(function() 
        messageStandby = true
    end, 50)
end

function onPeek(player_color)
    if isPublic == true and ownedBy ~= 'Black' then
        if peekable[player_color] == 0 then
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            broadcastToAll(player_color .. ' 플레이어가 카드를 멋대로 훔쳐봅니다.')
            Player[player_color].pingTable(self.getPosition())
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter()
    local cbag = findChesterBag()
    if cbag == nil then
        return false
    end
    if cbag.call('getValueNoMergeObject') == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function setOwnerByZone()
    if self.use_hands == false then
        return
    end
    local handed = 0
    local retPColor = nil
    local tmpobjs
    for i = 1, 11 do
        for j = 1, Player[userColorList[i]].getHandCount() do
            tmpobjs = Player[userColorList[i]].getHandObjects(j)
            for k = 1, #tmpobjs do
                if tmpobjs[k] == self then
                    if retPColor == nil then
                        retPColor = userColorList[i]
                    elseif retPColor ~= userColorList[i] then
                        return
                    end
                end
                break
            end
            if retPColor ~= nil then
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if retPColor ~= nil then
        ownedBy = retPColor
    end
end

function findChesterBag()
    local cbag = getObjectFromGUID('842fe7')
    if cbag == nil then
        local tobj = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #tobj do
            if tobj[i].getGMNotes() == 'CHESTER_BAG' then
                cbag = tobj[i]
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if cbag == nil then
        return nil
    else
        return cbag
    end
end

function callCallbackFunction(parameters)
    local cBag = findChesterBag()
    if cBag == nil then
        return
    else
        cBag.call('cardCallbackFunction', parameters)
    end
end

function restrictionCheck(pColor)
    local cBag = findChesterBag()
    local flag = cBag.call('getRestrictMore')
    if flag == 0 or flag == nil then
        return true
    end

    flag = cBag.call('tookSameCardAlready', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=pColor})
    if flag == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function openConfiguration(player_color, position, object)
    permitOK = false
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end

    if self.is_face_down == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '-150 0 -150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 0 180')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '150 0 150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 180 180')
    end

    local aspectRatio = self.getBoundsNormalized().size.x / self.getBoundsNormalized().size.z
    self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'scale', tostring(0.15 / aspectRatio)..' 0.22 0.1')

    if self.UI.getAttribute('configurationUI', 'active') == 'false' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'false')
    end

    if cardName ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_cardName', 'text', cardName)
    end
    if etcMemo ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text', etcMemo)
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text', tostring(requireToken))

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if string.find(colorRestriction, userColorList[i]) then
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'True')
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'False')
        end
    end
    if isAvailable == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if forOpenToAll == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if isPublic == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if callbackCode ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text', callbackCode)
    end
end

function ifEdit(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
end

function onoffChange(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'isOn', value)
end

function btclick(player, value, id)
    if id == 'save_configuration' then
        cardName = self.UI.getAttribute('input_cardName', 'text')
        etcMemo = self.UI.getAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text')
        colorRestriction = ''
        for i = 1, 10 do
            if self.UI.getAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn') == 'True' then
                colorRestriction = colorRestriction .. userColorList[i]
            end
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isAvailable = true
        else
            isAvailable = false
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            forOpenToAll = false
        else
            forOpenToAll = true
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isPublic = false
        else
            isPublic = true
        end
        requireToken = tonumber(self.UI.getAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text'))
        if requireToken == nil or requireToken < 1 then
            requireToken = 1
        end
        callbackCode = self.UI.getAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text')
        
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    elseif id == 'abort_configuration' then
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    end
end

function setAvailable(bool_input)
    isAvailable = bool_input
end

function getAvailable()
    return isAvailable
end

function setCardName(input)
    cardName = input
end

function getCardName()
    return cardName
end

function setEtcMemo(input)
    etcMemo = input
end

function getEtcMemo()
    return etcMemo
end

function getColorRestriction()
    return colorRestriction
end

function setColorRestriction(input)
    colorRestriction = input
end

function permitThisCard(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then return end
    if permitOK == false then
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한을 완전히 해제합니다. (카드의 이름도 삭제됩니다).\n한 번 더 누르면 적용됩니다.', 'Black')
        permitOK = true
    else
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한이 해제되었습니다.', 'Black')
        isAvailable = true
        messageStandby = true
        cardName = ''
        colorRestriction = ''
    end
end

function setCallbackCode(input)
    callbackCode = input
end

GM이 블랙 토큰을 넣는 경우 전체 공개</Text>
