ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
-- Automatically added

userColorList = {}
userColorList[1] = 'White'
userColorList[2] = 'Brown'
userColorList[3] = 'Red'
userColorList[4] = 'Orange'
userColorList[5] = 'Yellow'
userColorList[6] = 'Green'
userColorList[7] = 'Teal'
userColorList[8] = 'Blue'
userColorList[9] = 'Purple'
userColorList[10] = 'Pink'
userColorList[11] = 'Black'

peekable = {}
peekable[userColorList[1]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[2]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[3]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[4]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[5]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[6]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[7]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[8]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[9]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[10]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[11]] = 1

ownedBy = nil
messageStandby = true
isHidden = 0
cardName = ''
etcMemo = ''
colorRestriction = ''
isAvailable = true
permitOK = false
requireToken = 1
forOpenToAll = false
isPublic = false
callbackCode = ''

function onLoad(script_state)
    self.setSnapPoints({
        {
            position = {0, 0, 0},
            tags = {"ChesterToken"}
        }
    })
    local state = nil
    if script_state ~= nil then
        state = JSON.decode(script_state)
    end
    if state ~= nil then
        isHidden = state.s_isHidden
        cardName = state.s_cardName
        etcMemo = state.s_etcMemo
        colorRestriction = state.s_colorRestriction
        isAvailable = state.s_isAvailable
        requireToken = state.s_requireToken
        forOpenToAll = state.s_forOpenToAll
        isPublic = state.s_isPublic
        callbackCode = state.s_callbackCode

        if cardName == nil then
            cardName = ''
        end
        if etcMemo == nil then
            etcMemo = ''
        end
        if colorRestriction == nil then
            colorRestriction = ''
        end
        if isAvailable == nil then
            isAvailable = true
        end
        for i = 1, 10 do
            peekable[userColorList[i]] = state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]]
        end
        if requireToken == nil then requireToken = 1 end
        if callbackCode == nil then
            callbackCode = ''
        end
    end

    if isHidden == 1 then
        self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
    end

    self.addContextMenuItem("카드설정 (GM)", openConfiguration)
    self.addContextMenuItem("획득제한해제(주의!)", permitThisCard, true)
    self.UI.setXml(self.UI.getXml() .. XML_SCRIPT)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        s_isHidden = isHidden,
        s_cardName = cardName,
        s_etcMemo = etcMemo,
        s_colorRestriction = colorRestriction,
        s_isAvailable = isAvailable,
        s_requireToken = requireToken,
        s_forOpenToAll = forOpenToAll,
        s_isPublic = isPublic,
        s_callbackCode = callbackCode,
        s_peekable = {}
    }
    for i = 1, 11 do
        state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]] = peekable[userColorList[i]]
    end
    return JSON.encode_pretty(state)
end

function setIsHidden(input)
    isHidden = input
end

function externCaller(parameters)
    local nArguments = #parameters
    if _G[parameters[1]] ~= nil then
        if nArguments == 1 then
            _G[parameters[1]]()
        elseif nArguments == 2 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2])
        elseif nArguments == 3 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3])
        elseif nArguments == 4 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4])
        elseif nArguments == 5 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5])
        elseif nArguments == 6 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6])
        elseif nArguments == 7 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6], parameters[7])
        end
    end
end

function deliverCard(tcolor, tokenObj, cBag)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
    end
    ownedBy = tcolor
    if tokenObj ~= nil then
        tokenObj.destroyObject()
    end

    if requireToken > 1 then
        local removeCount = requireToken - 1
        local objs = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #objs do
            if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                    if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                        removeCount = removeCount - 1
                        objs[i].destroyObject()
                        if removeCount == 0 then
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    isHidden = 0
    self.use_hands = true
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('takeListAdd', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=tcolor})
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false then
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then return end
        if Player[tcolor].seated == true then
            if tcolor == 'Black' then
                broadcastToColor('카드가 전체공개 되었습니다.', tcolor)
            else
                broadcastToColor('이 카드는 소유할 수 없는 "보기전용" 공용 카드이므로, Alt+Shift를 이용해 보셔야 합니다.', tcolor)
            end
        end
        ownedBy = nil
        peekable[tcolor] = 1
        if tcolor ~= 'Black' then    
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                })
            end
        else
            ownedBy = 'Black'
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                })
            end
        end
    else
        if forOpenToAll == true then
            Wait.frames(function()
                broadcastToAll('이 카드는 전체 공개 카드입니다.', {1, 1, 0})
                if self.is_face_down == true then
                    self.flip()
                end
                if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                    callCallbackFunction({
                        cardGuid = self.guid,
                        cardName = cardName,
                        etcMemo = etcMemo,
                        callbackCode = callbackCode,
                        tcolor = tcolor,
                        peekable = peekable,
                        ownedBy = ownedBy,
                    })
                end
            end, 20)
        else
            if Player[tcolor].getHandCount() > 0 then
                Wait.frames(function()
                    self.deal(1, ownedBy, 1)
                    if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                        callCallbackFunction({
                            cardGuid = self.guid,
                            cardName = cardName,
                            etcMemo = etcMemo,
                            callbackCode = callbackCode,
                            tcolor = tcolor,
                            peekable = peekable,
                            ownedBy = ownedBy,
                        })
                    end
                end, 20)
            end
        end
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(collision)
    local tmpobj
    local tcolor = nil
    local cBag
    if collision == nil then return end
    if messageStandby == false then return end
    if ownedBy == nil then
        tmpobj = collision.collision_object
        if math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) > 0.1 or math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) > 0.1 then
            return
        end
        if string.find(tmpobj.getGMNotes(), 'Token:') then
            if isAvailable == false then
                messageWait('이 카드는 현재 획득할 수 없습니다.')
                return
            end
            for i = 1, 11 do
                if tmpobj.getGMNotes() == 'Token:' .. userColorList[i] then
                    tcolor = userColorList[i]
                    break
                end
            end
            if tcolor == nil then
                return
            else
                cBag = findChesterBag()
                if cBag.call('getRestrictMore') == 1 then
                    if restrictionCheck(tcolor) == false then
                        messageWait('같은 종류의 카드는 한 페이즈에 한 번만 가져갈 수 있습니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if cBag.call('getColorRestriction') == 1 and string.find(colorRestriction, tcolor) then
                    messageWait(tcolor..' 플레이어는 이 카드의 획득이 금지되어 있습니다.')
                    return
                end

                -- 토큰 수량 판정
                if requireToken > 1 then
                    local tokenCount = requireToken
                    local objs = getObjects()
                    for i = 1, #objs do
                        if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                            if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                                if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                                    tokenCount = tokenCount - 1
                                    if tokenCount == 0 then
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if tokenCount > 0 then
                        messageWait('이 카드의 획득을 위해서는 토큰 '..tostring(tokenCount)..'개(총 '..tostring(requireToken)..'개)가 더 필요합니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if prevCondition(tcolor) == false then
                    messageWait('해당 아이템 카드가 먼저 조사되어야 합니다.')
                    return
                end

                deliverCard(tcolor, tmpobj, cBag)
            end
        else
            return
        end
    else
        return
    end
end

function byPluralToken(pobj)
    onCollisionEnter({collision_object = pobj})
end

function messageWait(broadcasting)
    messageStandby = false
    broadcastToAll(broadcasting, {1, 1, 0})
    Wait.frames(function() 
        messageStandby = true
    end, 50)
end

function onPeek(player_color)
    if isPublic == true and ownedBy ~= 'Black' then
        if peekable[player_color] == 0 then
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            broadcastToAll(player_color .. ' 플레이어가 카드를 멋대로 훔쳐봅니다.')
            Player[player_color].pingTable(self.getPosition())
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter()
    local cbag = findChesterBag()
    if cbag == nil then
        return false
    end
    if cbag.call('getValueNoMergeObject') == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function setOwnerByZone()
    if self.use_hands == false then
        return
    end
    local handed = 0
    local retPColor = nil
    local tmpobjs
    for i = 1, 11 do
        for j = 1, Player[userColorList[i]].getHandCount() do
            tmpobjs = Player[userColorList[i]].getHandObjects(j)
            for k = 1, #tmpobjs do
                if tmpobjs[k] == self then
                    if retPColor == nil then
                        retPColor = userColorList[i]
                    elseif retPColor ~= userColorList[i] then
                        return
                    end
                end
                break
            end
            if retPColor ~= nil then
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if retPColor ~= nil then
        ownedBy = retPColor
    end
end

function findChesterBag()
    local cbag = getObjectFromGUID('842fe7')
    if cbag == nil then
        local tobj = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #tobj do
            if tobj[i].getGMNotes() == 'CHESTER_BAG' then
                cbag = tobj[i]
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if cbag == nil then
        return nil
    else
        return cbag
    end
end

function callCallbackFunction(parameters)
    local cBag = findChesterBag()
    if cBag == nil then
        return
    else
        cBag.call('cardCallbackFunction', parameters)
    end
end

function restrictionCheck(pColor)
    local cBag = findChesterBag()
    local flag = cBag.call('getRestrictMore')
    if flag == 0 or flag == nil then
        return true
    end

    flag = cBag.call('tookSameCardAlready', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=pColor})
    if flag == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function openConfiguration(player_color, position, object)
    permitOK = false
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end

    if self.is_face_down == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '-150 0 -150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 0 180')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '150 0 150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 180 180')
    end

    local aspectRatio = self.getBoundsNormalized().size.x / self.getBoundsNormalized().size.z
    self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'scale', tostring(0.15 / aspectRatio)..' 0.22 0.1')

    if self.UI.getAttribute('configurationUI', 'active') == 'false' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'false')
    end

    if cardName ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_cardName', 'text', cardName)
    end
    if etcMemo ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text', etcMemo)
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text', tostring(requireToken))

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if string.find(colorRestriction, userColorList[i]) then
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'True')
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'False')
        end
    end
    if isAvailable == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if forOpenToAll == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if isPublic == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if callbackCode ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text', callbackCode)
    end
end

function ifEdit(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
end

function onoffChange(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'isOn', value)
end

function btclick(player, value, id)
    if id == 'save_configuration' then
        cardName = self.UI.getAttribute('input_cardName', 'text')
        etcMemo = self.UI.getAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text')
        colorRestriction = ''
        for i = 1, 10 do
            if self.UI.getAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn') == 'True' then
                colorRestriction = colorRestriction .. userColorList[i]
            end
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isAvailable = true
        else
            isAvailable = false
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            forOpenToAll = false
        else
            forOpenToAll = true
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isPublic = false
        else
            isPublic = true
        end
        requireToken = tonumber(self.UI.getAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text'))
        if requireToken == nil or requireToken < 1 then
            requireToken = 1
        end
        callbackCode = self.UI.getAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text')
        
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    elseif id == 'abort_configuration' then
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    end
end

function setAvailable(bool_input)
    isAvailable = bool_input
end

function getAvailable()
    return isAvailable
end

function setCardName(input)
    cardName = input
end

function getCardName()
    return cardName
end

function setEtcMemo(input)
    etcMemo = input
end

function getEtcMemo()
    return etcMemo
end

function getColorRestriction()
    return colorRestriction
end

function setColorRestriction(input)
    colorRestriction = input
end

function permitThisCard(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then return end
    if permitOK == false then
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한을 완전히 해제합니다. (카드의 이름도 삭제됩니다).\n한 번 더 누르면 적용됩니다.', 'Black')
        permitOK = true
    else
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한이 해제되었습니다.', 'Black')
        isAvailable = true
        messageStandby = true
        cardName = ''
        colorRestriction = ''
    end
end

function setCallbackCode(input)
    callbackCode = input
end

function prevCondition(tcolor)
    local memo = getEtcMemo()
    local tguid = memo:match("prev=([^;]+)")

    if tguid == nil then
        return true
    end
    local prevCard = getObjectFromGUID(tguid)
    if prevCard == nil then
        return true
    end
    local pcHandZoneOfColor = Global.call('externGetTable', 'pcHandZoneOfColor')
    if pcHandZoneOfColor == nil or pcHandZoneOfColor[tcolor] == nil then
        return false
    end
    
    local zones = prevCard.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'MainTableZone' and prevCard.is_face_down == false then
            return true
        elseif zones[i].getName() == 'coverzone' and zones[i].getGMNotes() == 'tz-'..tcolor then
            return true
        elseif zones[i] == pcHandZoneOfColor[tcolor] then
            return true
        end
    end

    return false
end

function findObject(name, description, gmnote)
    local objs = getObjects()
    if name == nil and description == nil and gmnote == nil then
        return nil
    end
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if (objs[i].getName() == name or name == nil) and (objs[i].getDescription() == description or description == nil) and (objs[i].getGMNotes() == gmnote or gmnote == nil) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
end

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
-- Automatically added

userColorList = {}
userColorList[1] = 'White'
userColorList[2] = 'Brown'
userColorList[3] = 'Red'
userColorList[4] = 'Orange'
userColorList[5] = 'Yellow'
userColorList[6] = 'Green'
userColorList[7] = 'Teal'
userColorList[8] = 'Blue'
userColorList[9] = 'Purple'
userColorList[10] = 'Pink'
userColorList[11] = 'Black'

peekable = {}
peekable[userColorList[1]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[2]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[3]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[4]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[5]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[6]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[7]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[8]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[9]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[10]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[11]] = 1

ownedBy = nil
messageStandby = true
isHidden = 0
cardName = ''
etcMemo = ''
colorRestriction = ''
isAvailable = true
permitOK = false
requireToken = 1
forOpenToAll = false
isPublic = false
callbackCode = ''

function onLoad(script_state)
    self.setSnapPoints({
        {
            position = {0, 0, 0},
            tags = {"ChesterToken"}
        }
    })
    local state = nil
    if script_state ~= nil then
        state = JSON.decode(script_state)
    end
    if state ~= nil then
        isHidden = state.s_isHidden
        cardName = state.s_cardName
        etcMemo = state.s_etcMemo
        colorRestriction = state.s_colorRestriction
        isAvailable = state.s_isAvailable
        requireToken = state.s_requireToken
        forOpenToAll = state.s_forOpenToAll
        isPublic = state.s_isPublic
        callbackCode = state.s_callbackCode

        if cardName == nil then
            cardName = ''
        end
        if etcMemo == nil then
            etcMemo = ''
        end
        if colorRestriction == nil then
            colorRestriction = ''
        end
        if isAvailable == nil then
            isAvailable = true
        end
        for i = 1, 10 do
            peekable[userColorList[i]] = state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]]
        end
        if requireToken == nil then requireToken = 1 end
        if callbackCode == nil then
            callbackCode = ''
        end
    end

    if isHidden == 1 then
        self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
    end

    self.addContextMenuItem("카드설정 (GM)", openConfiguration)
    self.addContextMenuItem("획득제한해제(주의!)", permitThisCard, true)
    self.UI.setXml(self.UI.getXml() .. XML_SCRIPT)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        s_isHidden = isHidden,
        s_cardName = cardName,
        s_etcMemo = etcMemo,
        s_colorRestriction = colorRestriction,
        s_isAvailable = isAvailable,
        s_requireToken = requireToken,
        s_forOpenToAll = forOpenToAll,
        s_isPublic = isPublic,
        s_callbackCode = callbackCode,
        s_peekable = {}
    }
    for i = 1, 11 do
        state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]] = peekable[userColorList[i]]
    end
    return JSON.encode_pretty(state)
end

function setIsHidden(input)
    isHidden = input
end

function externCaller(parameters)
    local nArguments = #parameters
    if _G[parameters[1]] ~= nil then
        if nArguments == 1 then
            _G[parameters[1]]()
        elseif nArguments == 2 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2])
        elseif nArguments == 3 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3])
        elseif nArguments == 4 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4])
        elseif nArguments == 5 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5])
        elseif nArguments == 6 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6])
        elseif nArguments == 7 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6], parameters[7])
        end
    end
end

function deliverCard(tcolor, tokenObj, cBag)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
    end
    ownedBy = tcolor
    if tokenObj ~= nil then
        tokenObj.destroyObject()
    end

    if requireToken > 1 then
        local removeCount = requireToken - 1
        local objs = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #objs do
            if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                    if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                        removeCount = removeCount - 1
                        objs[i].destroyObject()
                        if removeCount == 0 then
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    isHidden = 0
    self.use_hands = true
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('takeListAdd', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=tcolor})
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false then
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then return end
        if Player[tcolor].seated == true then
            if tcolor == 'Black' then
                broadcastToColor('카드가 전체공개 되었습니다.', tcolor)
            else
                broadcastToColor('이 카드는 소유할 수 없는 "보기전용" 공용 카드이므로, Alt+Shift를 이용해 보셔야 합니다.', tcolor)
            end
        end
        ownedBy = nil
        peekable[tcolor] = 1
        if tcolor ~= 'Black' then    
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                })
            end
        else
            ownedBy = 'Black'
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                })
            end
        end
    else
        if forOpenToAll == true then
            Wait.frames(function()
                broadcastToAll('이 카드는 전체 공개 카드입니다.', {1, 1, 0})
                if self.is_face_down == true then
                    self.flip()
                end
                if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                    callCallbackFunction({
                        cardGuid = self.guid,
                        cardName = cardName,
                        etcMemo = etcMemo,
                        callbackCode = callbackCode,
                        tcolor = tcolor,
                        peekable = peekable,
                        ownedBy = ownedBy,
                    })
                end
            end, 20)
        else
            if Player[tcolor].getHandCount() > 0 then
                Wait.frames(function()
                    self.deal(1, ownedBy, 1)
                    if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                        callCallbackFunction({
                            cardGuid = self.guid,
                            cardName = cardName,
                            etcMemo = etcMemo,
                            callbackCode = callbackCode,
                            tcolor = tcolor,
                            peekable = peekable,
                            ownedBy = ownedBy,
                        })
                    end
                end, 20)
            end
        end
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(collision)
    local tmpobj
    local tcolor = nil
    local cBag
    if collision == nil then return end
    if messageStandby == false then return end
    if ownedBy == nil then
        tmpobj = collision.collision_object
        if math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) > 0.1 or math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) > 0.1 then
            return
        end
        if string.find(tmpobj.getGMNotes(), 'Token:') then
            if isAvailable == false then
                messageWait('이 카드는 현재 획득할 수 없습니다.')
                return
            end
            for i = 1, 11 do
                if tmpobj.getGMNotes() == 'Token:' .. userColorList[i] then
                    tcolor = userColorList[i]
                    break
                end
            end
            if tcolor == nil then
                return
            else
                cBag = findChesterBag()
                if cBag.call('getRestrictMore') == 1 then
                    if restrictionCheck(tcolor) == false then
                        messageWait('같은 종류의 카드는 한 페이즈에 한 번만 가져갈 수 있습니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if cBag.call('getColorRestriction') == 1 and string.find(colorRestriction, tcolor) then
                    messageWait(tcolor..' 플레이어는 이 카드의 획득이 금지되어 있습니다.')
                    return
                end

                -- 토큰 수량 판정
                if requireToken > 1 then
                    local tokenCount = requireToken
                    local objs = getObjects()
                    for i = 1, #objs do
                        if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                            if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                                if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                                    tokenCount = tokenCount - 1
                                    if tokenCount == 0 then
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if tokenCount > 0 then
                        messageWait('이 카드의 획득을 위해서는 토큰 '..tostring(tokenCount)..'개(총 '..tostring(requireToken)..'개)가 더 필요합니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if prevCondition(tcolor) == false then
                    messageWait('해당 아이템 카드가 먼저 조사되어야 합니다.')
                    return
                end

                deliverCard(tcolor, tmpobj, cBag)
            end
        else
            return
        end
    else
        return
    end
end

function byPluralToken(pobj)
    onCollisionEnter({collision_object = pobj})
end

function messageWait(broadcasting)
    messageStandby = false
    broadcastToAll(broadcasting, {1, 1, 0})
    Wait.frames(function() 
        messageStandby = true
    end, 50)
end

function onPeek(player_color)
    if isPublic == true and ownedBy ~= 'Black' then
        if peekable[player_color] == 0 then
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            broadcastToAll(player_color .. ' 플레이어가 카드를 멋대로 훔쳐봅니다.')
            Player[player_color].pingTable(self.getPosition())
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter()
    local cbag = findChesterBag()
    if cbag == nil then
        return false
    end
    if cbag.call('getValueNoMergeObject') == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function setOwnerByZone()
    if self.use_hands == false then
        return
    end
    local handed = 0
    local retPColor = nil
    local tmpobjs
    for i = 1, 11 do
        for j = 1, Player[userColorList[i]].getHandCount() do
            tmpobjs = Player[userColorList[i]].getHandObjects(j)
            for k = 1, #tmpobjs do
                if tmpobjs[k] == self then
                    if retPColor == nil then
                        retPColor = userColorList[i]
                    elseif retPColor ~= userColorList[i] then
                        return
                    end
                end
                break
            end
            if retPColor ~= nil then
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if retPColor ~= nil then
        ownedBy = retPColor
    end
end

function findChesterBag()
    local cbag = getObjectFromGUID('842fe7')
    if cbag == nil then
        local tobj = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #tobj do
            if tobj[i].getGMNotes() == 'CHESTER_BAG' then
                cbag = tobj[i]
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if cbag == nil then
        return nil
    else
        return cbag
    end
end

function callCallbackFunction(parameters)
    local cBag = findChesterBag()
    if cBag == nil then
        return
    else
        cBag.call('cardCallbackFunction', parameters)
    end
end

function restrictionCheck(pColor)
    local cBag = findChesterBag()
    local flag = cBag.call('getRestrictMore')
    if flag == 0 or flag == nil then
        return true
    end

    flag = cBag.call('tookSameCardAlready', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=pColor})
    if flag == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function openConfiguration(player_color, position, object)
    permitOK = false
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end

    if self.is_face_down == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '-150 0 -150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 0 180')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '150 0 150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 180 180')
    end

    local aspectRatio = self.getBoundsNormalized().size.x / self.getBoundsNormalized().size.z
    self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'scale', tostring(0.15 / aspectRatio)..' 0.22 0.1')

    if self.UI.getAttribute('configurationUI', 'active') == 'false' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'false')
    end

    if cardName ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_cardName', 'text', cardName)
    end
    if etcMemo ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text', etcMemo)
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text', tostring(requireToken))

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if string.find(colorRestriction, userColorList[i]) then
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'True')
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'False')
        end
    end
    if isAvailable == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if forOpenToAll == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if isPublic == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if callbackCode ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text', callbackCode)
    end
end

function ifEdit(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
end

function onoffChange(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'isOn', value)
end

function btclick(player, value, id)
    if id == 'save_configuration' then
        cardName = self.UI.getAttribute('input_cardName', 'text')
        etcMemo = self.UI.getAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text')
        colorRestriction = ''
        for i = 1, 10 do
            if self.UI.getAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn') == 'True' then
                colorRestriction = colorRestriction .. userColorList[i]
            end
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isAvailable = true
        else
            isAvailable = false
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            forOpenToAll = false
        else
            forOpenToAll = true
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isPublic = false
        else
            isPublic = true
        end
        requireToken = tonumber(self.UI.getAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text'))
        if requireToken == nil or requireToken < 1 then
            requireToken = 1
        end
        callbackCode = self.UI.getAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text')
        
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    elseif id == 'abort_configuration' then
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    end
end

function setAvailable(bool_input)
    isAvailable = bool_input
end

function getAvailable()
    return isAvailable
end

function setCardName(input)
    cardName = input
end

function getCardName()
    return cardName
end

function setEtcMemo(input)
    etcMemo = input
end

function getEtcMemo()
    return etcMemo
end

function getColorRestriction()
    return colorRestriction
end

function setColorRestriction(input)
    colorRestriction = input
end

function permitThisCard(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then return end
    if permitOK == false then
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한을 완전히 해제합니다. (카드의 이름도 삭제됩니다).\n한 번 더 누르면 적용됩니다.', 'Black')
        permitOK = true
    else
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한이 해제되었습니다.', 'Black')
        isAvailable = true
        messageStandby = true
        cardName = ''
        colorRestriction = ''
    end
end

function setCallbackCode(input)
    callbackCode = input
end

function prevCondition(tcolor)
    local memo = getEtcMemo()
    local tguid = memo:match("prev=([^;]+)")

    if tguid == nil then
        return true
    end
    local prevCard = getObjectFromGUID(tguid)
    if prevCard == nil then
        return true
    end
    local pcHandZoneOfColor = Global.call('externGetTable', 'pcHandZoneOfColor')
    if pcHandZoneOfColor == nil or pcHandZoneOfColor[tcolor] == nil then
        return false
    end
    
    local zones = prevCard.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'MainTableZone' and prevCard.is_face_down == false then
            return true
        elseif zones[i].getName() == 'coverzone' and zones[i].getGMNotes() == 'tz-'..tcolor then
            return true
        elseif zones[i] == pcHandZoneOfColor[tcolor] then
            return true
        end
    end

    return false
end

function findObject(name, description, gmnote)
    local objs = getObjects()
    if name == nil and description == nil and gmnote == nil then
        return nil
    end
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if (objs[i].getName() == name or name == nil) and (objs[i].getDescription() == description or description == nil) and (objs[i].getGMNotes() == gmnote or gmnote == nil) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
end

ContainedObjects.Name: Card
ContainedObjects.LuaScript:
-- Automatically added

userColorList = {}
userColorList[1] = 'White'
userColorList[2] = 'Brown'
userColorList[3] = 'Red'
userColorList[4] = 'Orange'
userColorList[5] = 'Yellow'
userColorList[6] = 'Green'
userColorList[7] = 'Teal'
userColorList[8] = 'Blue'
userColorList[9] = 'Purple'
userColorList[10] = 'Pink'
userColorList[11] = 'Black'

peekable = {}
peekable[userColorList[1]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[2]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[3]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[4]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[5]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[6]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[7]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[8]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[9]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[10]] = 0
peekable[userColorList[11]] = 1

ownedBy = nil
messageStandby = true
isHidden = 0
cardName = ''
etcMemo = ''
colorRestriction = ''
isAvailable = true
permitOK = false
requireToken = 1
forOpenToAll = false
isPublic = false
callbackCode = ''

function onLoad(script_state)
    self.setSnapPoints({
        {
            position = {0, 0, 0},
            tags = {"ChesterToken"}
        }
    })
    local state = nil
    if script_state ~= nil then
        state = JSON.decode(script_state)
    end
    if state ~= nil then
        isHidden = state.s_isHidden
        cardName = state.s_cardName
        etcMemo = state.s_etcMemo
        colorRestriction = state.s_colorRestriction
        isAvailable = state.s_isAvailable
        requireToken = state.s_requireToken
        forOpenToAll = state.s_forOpenToAll
        isPublic = state.s_isPublic
        callbackCode = state.s_callbackCode

        if cardName == nil then
            cardName = ''
        end
        if etcMemo == nil then
            etcMemo = ''
        end
        if colorRestriction == nil then
            colorRestriction = ''
        end
        if isAvailable == nil then
            isAvailable = true
        end
        for i = 1, 10 do
            peekable[userColorList[i]] = state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]]
        end
        if requireToken == nil then requireToken = 1 end
        if callbackCode == nil then
            callbackCode = ''
        end
    end

    if isHidden == 1 then
        self.setHiddenFrom({'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'})
    end

    self.addContextMenuItem("카드설정 (GM)", openConfiguration)
    self.addContextMenuItem("획득제한해제(주의!)", permitThisCard, true)
    self.UI.setXml(self.UI.getXml() .. XML_SCRIPT)
end

function onSave()
    local state = {
        s_isHidden = isHidden,
        s_cardName = cardName,
        s_etcMemo = etcMemo,
        s_colorRestriction = colorRestriction,
        s_isAvailable = isAvailable,
        s_requireToken = requireToken,
        s_forOpenToAll = forOpenToAll,
        s_isPublic = isPublic,
        s_callbackCode = callbackCode,
        s_peekable = {}
    }
    for i = 1, 11 do
        state.s_peekable[userColorList[i]] = peekable[userColorList[i]]
    end
    return JSON.encode_pretty(state)
end

function setIsHidden(input)
    isHidden = input
end

function externCaller(parameters)
    local nArguments = #parameters
    if _G[parameters[1]] ~= nil then
        if nArguments == 1 then
            _G[parameters[1]]()
        elseif nArguments == 2 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2])
        elseif nArguments == 3 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3])
        elseif nArguments == 4 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4])
        elseif nArguments == 5 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5])
        elseif nArguments == 6 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6])
        elseif nArguments == 7 then
            _G[parameters[1]](parameters[2], parameters[3], parameters[4], parameters[5], parameters[6], parameters[7])
        end
    end
end

function deliverCard(tcolor, tokenObj, cBag)
    if cBag == nil then
        cBag = findChesterBag()
    end
    ownedBy = tcolor
    if tokenObj ~= nil then
        tokenObj.destroyObject()
    end

    if requireToken > 1 then
        local removeCount = requireToken - 1
        local objs = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #objs do
            if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                    if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                        removeCount = removeCount - 1
                        objs[i].destroyObject()
                        if removeCount == 0 then
                            break
                        end
                    end
                end
            end
        end
    end

    self.setHiddenFrom({})
    isHidden = 0
    self.use_hands = true
    if cBag ~= nil then
        cBag.call('takeListAdd', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=tcolor})
    end

    if isPublic == true and forOpenToAll == false then
        if ownedBy == 'Black' then return end
        if Player[tcolor].seated == true then
            if tcolor == 'Black' then
                broadcastToColor('카드가 전체공개 되었습니다.', tcolor)
            else
                broadcastToColor('이 카드는 소유할 수 없는 "보기전용" 공용 카드이므로, Alt+Shift를 이용해 보셔야 합니다.', tcolor)
            end
        end
        ownedBy = nil
        peekable[tcolor] = 1
        if tcolor ~= 'Black' then    
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                })
            end
        else
            ownedBy = 'Black'
            self.setHiddenFrom({})
            if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                callCallbackFunction({
                    cardGuid = self.guid,
                    cardName = cardName,
                    etcMemo = etcMemo,
                    callbackCode = callbackCode,
                    tcolor = tcolor,
                    peekable = peekable,
                    ownedBy = ownedBy,
                })
            end
        end
    else
        if forOpenToAll == true then
            Wait.frames(function()
                broadcastToAll('이 카드는 전체 공개 카드입니다.', {1, 1, 0})
                if self.is_face_down == true then
                    self.flip()
                end
                if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                    callCallbackFunction({
                        cardGuid = self.guid,
                        cardName = cardName,
                        etcMemo = etcMemo,
                        callbackCode = callbackCode,
                        tcolor = tcolor,
                        peekable = peekable,
                        ownedBy = ownedBy,
                    })
                end
            end, 20)
        else
            if Player[tcolor].getHandCount() > 0 then
                Wait.frames(function()
                    self.deal(1, ownedBy, 1)
                    if callbackCode ~= '' and callbackCode ~= nil then
                        callCallbackFunction({
                            cardGuid = self.guid,
                            cardName = cardName,
                            etcMemo = etcMemo,
                            callbackCode = callbackCode,
                            tcolor = tcolor,
                            peekable = peekable,
                            ownedBy = ownedBy,
                        })
                    end
                end, 20)
            end
        end
    end
end

function onCollisionEnter(collision)
    local tmpobj
    local tcolor = nil
    local cBag
    if collision == nil then return end
    if messageStandby == false then return end
    if ownedBy == nil then
        tmpobj = collision.collision_object
        if math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) > 0.1 or math.abs(tmpobj.getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) > 0.1 then
            return
        end
        if string.find(tmpobj.getGMNotes(), 'Token:') then
            if isAvailable == false then
                messageWait('이 카드는 현재 획득할 수 없습니다.')
                return
            end
            for i = 1, 11 do
                if tmpobj.getGMNotes() == 'Token:' .. userColorList[i] then
                    tcolor = userColorList[i]
                    break
                end
            end
            if tcolor == nil then
                return
            else
                cBag = findChesterBag()
                if cBag.call('getRestrictMore') == 1 then
                    if restrictionCheck(tcolor) == false then
                        messageWait('같은 종류의 카드는 한 페이즈에 한 번만 가져갈 수 있습니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if cBag.call('getColorRestriction') == 1 and string.find(colorRestriction, tcolor) then
                    messageWait(tcolor..' 플레이어는 이 카드의 획득이 금지되어 있습니다.')
                    return
                end

                -- 토큰 수량 판정
                if requireToken > 1 then
                    local tokenCount = requireToken
                    local objs = getObjects()
                    for i = 1, #objs do
                        if objs[i].getGMNotes() == 'Token:'..tcolor then
                            if math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().x - self.getPosition().x) < 0.1 and math.abs(objs[i].getPosition().z - self.getPosition().z) < 0.1 then
                                if objs[i].getPosition().y > self.getPosition().y then
                                    tokenCount = tokenCount - 1
                                    if tokenCount == 0 then
                                        break
                                    end
                                end
                            end
                        end
                    end
                    if tokenCount > 0 then
                        messageWait('이 카드의 획득을 위해서는 토큰 '..tostring(tokenCount)..'개(총 '..tostring(requireToken)..'개)가 더 필요합니다.')
                        return
                    end
                end
                if prevCondition(tcolor) == false then
                    messageWait('해당 아이템 카드가 먼저 조사되어야 합니다.')
                    return
                end

                deliverCard(tcolor, tmpobj, cBag)
            end
        else
            return
        end
    else
        return
    end
end

function byPluralToken(pobj)
    onCollisionEnter({collision_object = pobj})
end

function messageWait(broadcasting)
    messageStandby = false
    broadcastToAll(broadcasting, {1, 1, 0})
    Wait.frames(function() 
        messageStandby = true
    end, 50)
end

function onPeek(player_color)
    if isPublic == true and ownedBy ~= 'Black' then
        if peekable[player_color] == 0 then
            local tmphide = {}
            for i = 1, 10 do
                if peekable[userColorList[i]] == 0 then
                    tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = userColorList[i]
                end
            end
            tmphide[#tmphide + 1] = 'Grey'
            self.setHiddenFrom(tmphide)
            broadcastToAll(player_color .. ' 플레이어가 카드를 멋대로 훔쳐봅니다.')
            Player[player_color].pingTable(self.getPosition())
        end
    end
end

function tryObjectEnter()
    local cbag = findChesterBag()
    if cbag == nil then
        return false
    end
    if cbag.call('getValueNoMergeObject') == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function onObjectEnterZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function onObjectLeaveZone(zone, object)
    if object == self then
        setOwnerByZone()
    end
end

function setOwnerByZone()
    if self.use_hands == false then
        return
    end
    local handed = 0
    local retPColor = nil
    local tmpobjs
    for i = 1, 11 do
        for j = 1, Player[userColorList[i]].getHandCount() do
            tmpobjs = Player[userColorList[i]].getHandObjects(j)
            for k = 1, #tmpobjs do
                if tmpobjs[k] == self then
                    if retPColor == nil then
                        retPColor = userColorList[i]
                    elseif retPColor ~= userColorList[i] then
                        return
                    end
                end
                break
            end
            if retPColor ~= nil then
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if retPColor ~= nil then
        ownedBy = retPColor
    end
end

function findChesterBag()
    local cbag = getObjectFromGUID('842fe7')
    if cbag == nil then
        local tobj = getObjects()
        for i = 1, #tobj do
            if tobj[i].getGMNotes() == 'CHESTER_BAG' then
                cbag = tobj[i]
                break
            end
        end
    end
    if cbag == nil then
        return nil
    else
        return cbag
    end
end

function callCallbackFunction(parameters)
    local cBag = findChesterBag()
    if cBag == nil then
        return
    else
        cBag.call('cardCallbackFunction', parameters)
    end
end

function restrictionCheck(pColor)
    local cBag = findChesterBag()
    local flag = cBag.call('getRestrictMore')
    if flag == 0 or flag == nil then
        return true
    end

    flag = cBag.call('tookSameCardAlready', {input_cardName=cardName, input_pColor=pColor})
    if flag == 1 then
        return false
    else
        return true
    end
end

function openConfiguration(player_color, position, object)
    permitOK = false
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then
        return
    end

    if self.is_face_down == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '-150 0 -150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 0 180')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'position', '150 0 150')
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'rotation', '0 180 180')
    end

    local aspectRatio = self.getBoundsNormalized().size.x / self.getBoundsNormalized().size.z
    self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'scale', tostring(0.15 / aspectRatio)..' 0.22 0.1')

    if self.UI.getAttribute('configurationUI', 'active') == 'false' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'true')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('configurationUI', 'active', 'false')
    end

    if cardName ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_cardName', 'text', cardName)
    end
    if etcMemo ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text', etcMemo)
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text', tostring(requireToken))

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if string.find(colorRestriction, userColorList[i]) then
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'True')
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn', 'False')
        end
    end
    if isAvailable == false then
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if forOpenToAll == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if isPublic == true then
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'True')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn', 'False')
    end
    if callbackCode ~= nil then
        self.UI.setAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text', callbackCode)
    end
end

function ifEdit(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
end

function onoffChange(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'isOn', value)
end

function btclick(player, value, id)
    if id == 'save_configuration' then
        cardName = self.UI.getAttribute('input_cardName', 'text')
        etcMemo = self.UI.getAttribute('input_etcMemo', 'text')
        colorRestriction = ''
        for i = 1, 10 do
            if self.UI.getAttribute(userColorList[i]..'Toggle', 'isOn') == 'True' then
                colorRestriction = colorRestriction .. userColorList[i]
            end
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('InitialAvailableToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isAvailable = true
        else
            isAvailable = false
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('OpenToAllToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            forOpenToAll = false
        else
            forOpenToAll = true
        end
        if self.UI.getAttribute('PublicToggle', 'isOn') == 'False' then
            isPublic = false
        else
            isPublic = true
        end
        requireToken = tonumber(self.UI.getAttribute('input_requiredToken', 'text'))
        if requireToken == nil or requireToken < 1 then
            requireToken = 1
        end
        callbackCode = self.UI.getAttribute('input_callbackCode', 'text')
        
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    elseif id == 'abort_configuration' then
        openConfiguration('Black', nil, nil)
    end
end

function setAvailable(bool_input)
    isAvailable = bool_input
end

function getAvailable()
    return isAvailable
end

function setCardName(input)
    cardName = input
end

function getCardName()
    return cardName
end

function setEtcMemo(input)
    etcMemo = input
end

function getEtcMemo()
    return etcMemo
end

function getColorRestriction()
    return colorRestriction
end

function setColorRestriction(input)
    colorRestriction = input
end

function permitThisCard(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color ~= 'Black' then return end
    if permitOK == false then
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한을 완전히 해제합니다. (카드의 이름도 삭제됩니다).\n한 번 더 누르면 적용됩니다.', 'Black')
        permitOK = true
    else
        broadcastToColor('이 카드의 획득 제한이 해제되었습니다.', 'Black')
        isAvailable = true
        messageStandby = true
        cardName = ''
        colorRestriction = ''
    end
end

function setCallbackCode(input)
    callbackCode = input
end

function prevCondition(tcolor)
    local memo = getEtcMemo()
    local tguid = memo:match("prev=([^;]+)")

    if tguid == nil then
        return true
    end
    local prevCard = getObjectFromGUID(tguid)
    if prevCard == nil then
        return true
    end
    local pcHandZoneOfColor = Global.call('externGetTable', 'pcHandZoneOfColor')
    if pcHandZoneOfColor == nil or pcHandZoneOfColor[tcolor] == nil then
        return false
    end
    
    local zones = prevCard.getZones()
    for i = 1, #zones do
        if zones[i].getName() == 'MainTableZone' and prevCard.is_face_down == false then
            return true
        elseif zones[i].getName() == 'coverzone' and zones[i].getGMNotes() == 'tz-'..tcolor then
            return true
        elseif zones[i] == pcHandZoneOfColor[tcolor] then
            return true
        end
    end

    return false
end

function findObject(name, description, gmnote)
    local objs = getObjects()
    if name == nil and description == nil and gmnote == nil then
        return nil
    end
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if (objs[i].getName() == name or name == nil) and (objs[i].getDescription() == description or description == nil) and (objs[i].getGMNotes() == gmnote or gmnote == nil) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Board
ObjectStates.Nickname:
예비공간

카드를 앞면으로 뒤집어도 다른 사람에게
내용이 보이지 않습니다.
※핸드 공간이 부족할 때 사용하세요.

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
currentPage = 0
currentView = 1
currentIdx = 0
imgTbl = nil
globaluitest = 0
showing = 0
ratioTbl = {}
raycastLock = 'true'

function onLoad(en_state)
    local st = JSON.decode(en_state)
    if st ~= nil then
        imgTbl = st.imgTbl
        ratioTbl = st.ratioTbl
        raycastLock = st.raycastLock
    end
    if imgTbl == nil then
        imgTbl = {}
    end
    if ratioTbl == nil then
        ratioTbl = {}
        for i = 1, 200 do
            ratioTbl[i] = 100
        end
    end
    if raycastLock == nil then
        raycastLock = 'true'
    end

    Wait.frames(function()
        pageLoad()
        self.UI.setAttribute('preview', 'active', 'false')
        if imgTbl[currentView] ~= nil and string.find(imgTbl[currentView], 'http') then
            self.UI.setAttribute('preview', 'active', 'true')
            self.UI.setAttribute('preview', 'image', imgTbl[currentView])
            setGlobalScene(imgTbl[currentView], ratioTbl[currentView])
        else
            Global.UI.setAttribute('slideScene', 'active', 'false')
            self.UI.setAttribute('playerMonitor', 'image', '')
        end
        self.UI.setAttribute('preview_n', 'active', 'false')
        if imgTbl[currentView + 1] ~= nil and string.find(imgTbl[currentView + 1], 'http') then
            self.UI.setAttribute('preview_n', 'active', 'true')
            self.UI.setAttribute('preview_n', 'image', imgTbl[currentView + 1])
        end
        self.UI.setAttribute('preview_p', 'active', 'false')
        if imgTbl[currentView - 1] ~= nil and string.find(imgTbl[currentView - 1], 'http') then
            self.UI.setAttribute('preview_p', 'active', 'true')
            self.UI.setAttribute('preview_p', 'image', imgTbl[currentView - 1])
        end
    end, 20)
end

function setGlobalScene(imgUrl, heightRatio)
    Global.UI.setAttribute('slideScene', 'image', imgUrl)
    Global.UI.setAttribute('slideScene', 'height', heightRatio..'%')
    self.UI.setAttribute('playerMonitor', 'image', imgUrl)
    self.UI.setAttribute('playerMonitor', 'height', heightRatio..'%')
    Global.UI.setAttribute('slideScene', 'active', 'true')
    Global.UI.setAttribute('slideScene', 'raycastTarget', raycastLock)
end

function onSave()
    local st = {
        imgTbl = imgTbl,
        ratioTbl = ratioTbl,
        raycastLock = raycastLock
    }
    return JSON.encode(st)
end

function onEndEdit(player, value, id)
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
    local idxstr = string.gsub(id, 'if', '')
    local idxn = tonumber(idxstr)
    imgTbl[currentPage * 10 + idxn] = value
    if string.find(value, 'http') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('idxImage'..idxn, 'image', value)
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('idxImage'..idxn, 'image', '')
    end
end
function onEndEdit2(player, value, id)
    local idxstr = string.gsub(id, 'ratio', '')
    local idxn = tonumber(idxstr)
    local arith = tonumber(value)
    if arith == nil then
        value = ratioTbl[currentPage * 10 + idxn]
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute(id, 'text', value)
    ratioTbl[currentPage * 10 + idxn] = value
    if currentView == currentPage * 10 + idxn then
        Global.UI.setAttribute('slideScene', 'height', value..'%')
        self.UI.setAttribute('playerMonitor', 'height', value..'%')
    end
end

function pageLoad()
    for i = 1, 10 do
        local j = currentPage * 10 + i
        self.UI.setValue('index'..tostring(i), tostring(j))
        if imgTbl[j] ~= nil then
            self.UI.setAttribute('if'..tostring(i), 'text', imgTbl[j])
            if string.find(imgTbl[j], 'http') then
                self.UI.setAttribute('idxImage'..tostring(i), 'image', imgTbl[j])
            else
                self.UI.setAttribute('idxImage'..tostring(i), 'image', '')
            end
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute('if'..tostring(i), 'text', '')
            self.UI.setAttribute('idxImage'..tostring(i), 'image', '')
        end
        self.UI.setAttribute('ratio'..tostring(i), 'text', ratioTbl[j])
    end
    viewingCheck()
    if raycastLock == 'true' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('btRaycastImageTrue', 'active', 'true')
        self.UI.setAttribute('btRaycastImageFalse', 'active', 'false')
        self.UI.setAttribute('btRaycast', 'color', '#ff9100')
    else
        self.UI.setAttribute('btRaycastImageTrue', 'active', 'false')
        self.UI.setAttribute('btRaycastImageFalse', 'active', 'true')
        self.UI.setAttribute('btRaycast', 'color', '#00B800')
    end
end

function btClick1(player, value, id)
    if id == 'showBtn' then
        if showing == 0 then
            showing = 1
            if globaluitest == 0 then
                globaluitest = 1
                setGlobalUI()
            end
            Wait.frames(function ()
                self.UI.setAttribute('indimain', 'color', '#00FF00')
                self.UI.setValue('indimain', 'Showing')
                Global.UI.setAttribute('ChesterSlidePanel', 'active', 'true')
                self.UI.setAttribute('playerMonitor', 'active', 'true')
                if imgTbl[currentView] ~= nil and string.find(imgTbl[currentView], 'http') then
                    setGlobalScene(imgTbl[currentView], ratioTbl[currentView])
                end
            end, 10)
        else
            showing = 0
            self.UI.setAttribute('indimain', 'color', '#FF0000')
            self.UI.setValue('indimain', 'Not showing')
            Global.UI.setAttribute('ChesterSlidePanel', 'active', 'false')
            self.UI.setAttribute('playerMonitor', 'active', 'false')
        end

    elseif id == 'btPrev' then
        if currentView > 1 then
            currentView = currentView - 1
            viewingCheck()
            self.UI.setAttribute('preview', 'active', 'false')
            if imgTbl[currentView] ~= nil and string.find(imgTbl[currentView], 'http') then
                self.UI.setAttribute('preview', 'active', 'true')
                self.UI.setAttribute('preview', 'image', imgTbl[currentView])
                setGlobalScene(imgTbl[currentView], ratioTbl[currentView])
                Global.UI.setAttribute('slideScene', 'active', 'true')
            else
                Global.UI.setAttribute('slideScene', 'active', 'false')
                self.UI.setAttribute('playerMonitor', 'image', '')
            end
            self.UI.setAttribute('preview_n', 'active', 'false')
            if imgTbl[currentView + 1] ~= nil and string.find(imgTbl[currentView + 1], 'http') then
                self.UI.setAttribute('preview_n', 'active', 'true')
                self.UI.setAttribute('preview_n', 'image', imgTbl[currentView + 1])
            end
            self.UI.setAttribute('preview_p', 'active', 'false')
            if imgTbl[currentView - 1] ~= nil and string.find(imgTbl[currentView - 1], 'http') then
                self.UI.setAttribute('preview_p', 'active', 'true')
                self.UI.setAttribute('preview_p', 'image', imgTbl[currentView - 1])
            end

            if currentView % 10 == 0 then
                currentPage = currentPage - 1
                pageLoad()
            end
        end
    elseif id == 'btNext' then
        if currentView < 200 then
            currentView = currentView + 1
            viewingCheck()
            self.UI.setAttribute('preview', 'active', 'false')
            if imgTbl[currentView] ~= nil and string.find(imgTbl[currentView], 'http') then
                self.UI.setAttribute('preview', 'active', 'true')
                self.UI.setAttribute('preview', 'image', imgTbl[currentView])
                setGlobalScene(imgTbl[currentView], ratioTbl[currentView])
                Global.UI.setAttribute('slideScene', 'active', 'true')
            else
                Global.UI.setAttribute('slideScene', 'active', 'false')
                self.UI.setAttribute('playerMonitor', 'image', '')
            end
            self.UI.setAttribute('preview_n', 'active', 'false')
            if imgTbl[currentView + 1] ~= nil and string.find(imgTbl[currentView + 1], 'http') then
                self.UI.setAttribute('preview_n', 'active', 'true')
                self.UI.setAttribute('preview_n', 'image', imgTbl[currentView + 1])
            end
            self.UI.setAttribute('preview_p', 'active', 'false')
            if imgTbl[currentView - 1] ~= nil and string.find(imgTbl[currentView - 1], 'http') then
                self.UI.setAttribute('preview_p', 'active', 'true')
                self.UI.setAttribute('preview_p', 'image', imgTbl[currentView - 1])
            end

            if currentView % 10 == 1 then
                currentPage = currentPage + 1
                pageLoad()
            end
        end
    end
end

function btClick2(player, value, id)
    if id == 'btPrevPage' then
        currentPage = currentPage - 1
        if currentPage < 0 then
            currentPage = 0
        end
    elseif id == 'btNextPage' then
        currentPage = currentPage + 1
        if currentPage > 19 then 
            currentPage = 19
        end
    end
    pageLoad()
end

function btClick3(player, value, id)
    if globaluitest == 0 then
        globaluitest = 1
        setGlobalUI()
        Wait.frames(function()
            showImage(id)
        end, 10)
    else
        showImage(id)
    end
end

function btClick4(player, value, id)
    if raycastLock == 'true' then
        raycastLock = 'false'
    else
        raycastLock = 'true'
    end
    Global.UI.setAttribute('slideScene', 'raycastTarget', raycastLock)
    pageLoad()
end

function showImage(id)
    local idxstr = string.gsub(id, 'btScene', '')
    local idxn = tonumber(idxstr)
    currentView = currentPage * 10 + idxn

    currentIdx = idxn
    viewingCheck()
    self.UI.setAttribute('preview', 'active', 'false')
    if imgTbl[currentView] ~= nil and string.find(imgTbl[currentView], 'http') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('preview', 'active', 'true')
        self.UI.setAttribute('preview', 'image', imgTbl[currentView])
        Global.UI.setAttribute('slideScene', 'active', 'true')
        setGlobalScene(imgTbl[currentView], ratioTbl[currentView])
    else
        Global.UI.setAttribute('slideScene', 'active', 'false')
        self.UI.setAttribute('playerMonitor', 'image', '')
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('preview_n', 'active', 'false')
    if imgTbl[currentView + 1] ~= nil and string.find(imgTbl[currentView + 1], 'http') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('preview_n', 'active', 'true')
        self.UI.setAttribute('preview_n', 'image', imgTbl[currentView + 1])
    end
    self.UI.setAttribute('preview_p', 'active', 'false')
    if imgTbl[currentView - 1] ~= nil and string.find(imgTbl[currentView - 1], 'http') then
        self.UI.setAttribute('preview_p', 'active', 'true')
        self.UI.setAttribute('preview_p', 'image', imgTbl[currentView - 1])
    end
end

function setGlobalUI()
    local gui = Global.UI.getXml()
    local addstr = [=[    
<Panel id="ChesterSlidePanel" active="false" offsetXY="0 0">
<Image id="slideScene" active="true" height="25%" visibility="White|Brown|Red|Orange|Yellow|Green|Teal|Blue|Purple|Pink|Grey" raycastTarget="true" preserveAspect="true" image=""/>
</Panel>
]=]
    if string.find(gui, 'ChesterSlidePanel') then
    else
        local targetui = gui..addstr
        Global.UI.setXml(targetui)
    end
end

function viewingCheck()
    if Global.UI.getAttribute('ChesterSlidePanel', 'active') == 'true' then
        self.UI.setAttribute('indimain', 'active', 'true')
    end
    for i = 1, 10 do
        if i + (currentPage * 10) == currentView then
            self.UI.setAttribute('indi'..tostring(i), 'active', 'true')
        else
            self.UI.setAttribute('indi'..tostring(i), 'active', 'false')
        end
    end
end

ObjectStates.Name: Custom_Tile
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
btColor = {r=1, g=0, b=0}

function onLoad(en_state)
    local state = JSON.decode(en_state)
    if state ~= nil then
        if state.btColor ~= nil then
            btColor.r = state.btColor.r
            btColor.g = state.btColor.g
            btColor.b = state.btColor.b
        end
    end
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.21, z=-0.40}, scale={4, 4, 4}, color=btColor, 
        click_function='userFunction', function_owner=self, tooltip=self.getGMNotes()})
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.21, z=0.40}, scale={0.5, 0.5, 0.5}, color={r=0, g=0, b=0}, width=0, height=0,
        click_function='none', function_owner=self, fontSize=80, label=self.getGMNotes()})
    self.addContextMenuItem("캡션 설정", setCaption)
    self.addContextMenuItem("버튼색 설정", setBtColor)
end

function userFunction(obj, player_color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then return end
    
    -- 이 부분에 버튼 클릭 시 실행할 내용 작성
    local pcColorOfName = Global.call('externGetTable', 'pcColorOfName')
    local pcHandZoneOfColor = Global.call('externGetTable', 'pcHandZoneOfColor')
    if pcColorOfName == nil then return end
    local nameList = {'Scarlett', 'Bluee', 'Asphalt', 'Viola', 'Rosa', 'Weiss'}
    for i = 1, 6 do
        local sheet = findObject('DialogSheet', nil, nameList[i])
        if sheet == nil or pcColorOfName[nameList[i]] == nil or pcHandZoneOfColor[pcColorOfName[nameList[i]]] == nil then
            return 
        end
    end
    self.removeButton(0)
    for i = 1, 6 do
        local sheet = findObject('DialogSheet', nil, nameList[i])
        sheet.setDescription('show:'..pcColorOfName[nameList[i]])
        local hcolor = {pcColorOfName[nameList[i]]}
        sheet.setInvisibleTo(inverseColor(hcolor))
        Wait.frames(function()
            local tpos = pcHandZoneOfColor[pcColorOfName[nameList[i]]].getPosition()
            tpos.y = 3
            tpos.z = tpos.z - 12.5
            sheet.setScale({2.5, 1, 2.5})
            sheet.setPositionSmooth(tpos, false, false)
        end, 20)
    end

end





function onSave()
    local state = {
        btColor = {r = btColor.r, g = btColor.g, b = btColor.b}
    }
    return JSON.encode(state)
end

function setCaption(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        Player[player_color].showMemoDialog("캡션 설정 - 적절히 줄바꿈 추가해서 입력 (GMNote 데이터를 사용합니다)",
        function (text, player_color)
            self.editButton({
                index = 1,
                label = text
            })
            self.editButton({
                index = 0,
                tooltip = text
            })
            self.setGMNotes(text)
        end
        )
    end
end

function externSetCaption(text)
    self.editButton({
        index = 1,
        label = text
    })
    self.editButton({
        index = 0,
        tooltip = text
    })
    self.setGMNotes(text)
end

function setBtColor(player_color, position, object)
    if player_color == 'Black' then
        Player[player_color].showColorDialog({r=0, g=0, b=0},
        function (color, player_color)
            self.editButton({
                index = 0,
                color = color
            })
            btColor.r = color.r
            btColor.g = color.g
            btColor.b = color.b
        end
        )
    end
end

function findObject(name, description, gmnote)
    local objs = getObjects()
    if name == nil and description == nil and gmnote == nil then
        return nil
    end
    for i = 1, #objs do
        if (objs[i].getName() == name or name == nil) and (objs[i].getDescription() == description or description == nil) and (objs[i].getGMNotes() == gmnote or gmnote == nil) then
            return objs[i]
        end
    end
end
function inverseColor(colorTable)
    local retColors = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink', 'Grey'}
    for i = 1, #colorTable do
        removeByValue(retColors, colorTable[i])
    end
    return retColors
end
function removeByValue(t, val)
    for i, v in ipairs(t) do
        if v == val then
            table.remove(t, i)
            break
        end
    end
end

function none()
end

        if v == val then
            table.remove(t, i)

btColor = {r=1, g=0, b=0}

function onLoad(en_state)
    local state = JSON.decode(en_state)
    if state ~= nil then
        if state.btColor ~= nil then
            btColor.r = state.btColor.r
            btColor.g = state.btColor.g
            btColor.b = state.btColor.b
        end
    end
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.21, z=-0.40}, scale={4, 4, 4}, color=btColor, 
        click_function='userFunction', function_owner=self, tooltip=self.getGMNotes()})
    self.createButton({position={x=0, y=0.21, z=0.40}, scale={0.5, 0.5, 0.5}, color={r=0, g=0, b=0}, width=0, height=0,

function userFunction(obj, player_color, alt_click)
    if alt_click == true then return end
    
    -- 이 부분에 버튼 클릭 시 실행할 내용 작성
    local pcColorOfName = Global.call('externGetTable', 'pcColorOfName')
    local pcHandZoneOfColor = Global.call('externGetTable', 'pcHandZoneOfColor')
    if pcColorOfName['Bluee'] == nil then
        return
    end
    self.removeButton(0)
    getObjectFromGUID('5260f6').call('buttonClick_place')
    local b2 = getObjectFromGUID('e31939')
    if b2 ~= nil then
        b2.UI.setAttribute('blackmask', 'active', 'false')
    end
    Wait.frames(function()
        local cBag = getObjectFromGUID('842fe7')
        cBag.call('spawnTokenToAll')
        Wait.time(function()
            cBag.call('spawnTokenToAll')
            Wait.time(function()
                cBag.call('spawnTokenToAll')
                Wait.time(function()
                    cBag.call('spawnTokenToColor', pcColorOfName['Bluee'])
                    Wait.time(function()
                        cBag.call('spawnTokenToColor', pcColorOfName['Bluee'])
                        Wait.time(function()
                            local stk = nil
                            local tpos = nil
                            tpos = pcHandZoneOfColor[pcColorOfName['Asphalt']].getPosition()
                            stk = getObjectFromGUID('5d466e').clone({position={0.00, 1.67, 126.90}})
                            stk.setPositionSmooth({tpos.x, 3, -36.5}, false, true)
                            
                            tpos = pcHandZoneOfColor[pcColorOfName['Viola']].getPosition()
                            stk = getObjectFromGUID('5d466e').clone({position={0.00, 1.67, 126.90}})
                            stk.setPositionSmooth({tpos.x - 0.9, 3, -36.5}, false, true)
                            stk = getObjectFromGUID('5d466e').clone({position={0.00, 1.67, 126.90}})
                            stk.setPositionSmooth({tpos.x + 0.9, 3, -36.5}, false, true)
                            
                            tpos = pcHandZoneOfColor[pcColorOfName['Rosa']].getPosition()
                            stk = getObjectFromGUID('5d466e').clone({position={0.00, 1.67, 126.90}})
                            stk.setPositionSmooth({tpos.x, 3, -36.5}, false, true)

                            tpos = pcHandZoneOfColor[pcColorOfName['Weiss']].getPosition()
                            stk = getObjectFromGUID('5d466e').clone({position={0.00, 1.67, 126.90}})
                            stk.setPositionSmooth({tpos.x, 3, -36.5}, false, true)
                        end, 0.5)
                    end, 0.5)
                end, 0.5)
            end, 0.5)
        end, 0.5)
    end, 150)
end
